title: FPGA utvecklare
description:
**Professional Galaxy** är ett IT- och teknikkonsultbolag som tillhandahåller högspecialiserad kompetens inom IT, mjukvaruutveckling, SAP, inköp, elektronik och mekanisk konstruktion. Vi samarbetar med erfarna seniora experter och levererar strategiskt värdeskapande kompetens till några av Sveriges mest komplexa och analytiskt krävande projekt. Vårt fokus ligger alltid på hög kvalitet, professionalism och tydliga, mätbara resultat.


Vi söker nu en **FPGA utvecklare** hos vår kund.

**Om uppdraget**

**Beskrivning**


FPGA utvecklare, nivå 4  

  

Vi söker dig som vill kombinera tekniskt djup med samhällsnytta.  

Du är analytisk, nyfiken och trivs med att lösa avancerade problem i nära samarbete med andra.  

  

Roll  

* Designa och utveckla FPGA-baserade system för telekrigsapplikationer
* Testa och verifiera funktion för att säkerställa hög kvalitet och funktionalitet både med simuleringsverktyg och på HW
* Optimera och förbättra design med fokus på robusthet, effektivitet och lång livslängd
* Felsöka och analysera avancerade tekniska problem samt ta fram hållbara lösningar
* Delta aktivt i tekniska granskningar och bidra till kontinuerliga förbättringar av designmetodik och arbetssätt
* Samarbeta nära andra ingenjörer och utvecklare i ett agilt team

  

Profil  

* Relevant utbildningsbakgrund inom elektronik, teknisk fysik, datorteknik eller motsvarande
* Erfarenhet inom RF-domänen från ex försvarindustri, telekom eller motsvarande
* Erfarenhet av FPGA/ASIC-design och programmering
* Goda kunskaper i VHDL
* Erfarenhet av FPGA-kretsar från AMD(Xilinx) eller Altera
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift

  

Meriterande  

* Kunskap inom signalbehandling eller radarsystem
* Erfarenhet av hårdvarunära programmering och inbyggda system
* Kunskap inom Python/Java samt configuration management

  

Uppdraget kan omfattas av försvarssekretess, vilket innebär krav på svenskt medborgarskap och godkännande av säkerhetsprövning utförd av myndighet.  

  

**Uppdragsinformation**  

Uppdragslängd: ca 6 mån  

Placeringsort: Stockholm  

Svar önskas snarast, dock senast 2026-07-01
Är du rätt person för uppdraget, eller vill du rekommendera en stark kandidat? Tveka inte att kontakta oss.


Ansök gärna redan idag, urval och intervjuer sker löpande


Ansök genom att bifoga ditt CV (vi vill inte ha något personligt brev) och besvara urvalsfrågorna. Frågorna utgår från kravprofilen för den här rekryteringen och dina svar ligger till grund för det urval som sker i processen. Att besvara frågorna är en förutsättning för att din ansökan ska anses komplett.  

Vänligen notera att krav och eventuella meriter ska vara uppfyllda vid ansökningstillfället.

title: PHP utvecklare till växande PS Finance Group på Lindholmen
description:
Är du PS Finance Groups nästa fullstackutvecklare inom PHP?


Bergvik & Partners hjälper PS Finance Group att hitta en driven och lösningsorienterad PHP utvecklare som vill vara med och utveckla affärskritiska system i en miljö där stabilitet, ansvar och kvalitet står i fokus.


Om rollen


I rollen får du kombinera support, förvaltning och nyutveckling i en vardag där teknik, verksamhet och affär hänger tätt ihop. Du kommer att arbeta med att säkra, vidareutveckla och förbättra befintlig funktionalitet, samtidigt som du är med och bygger nya lösningar som tar systemen framåt.


Det här är en roll för dig som trivs med att förstå helheten, ta ansvar för att saker fungerar i praktiken och som gillar att utveckla robusta lösningar över tid. Hos PS Finance Group handlar utveckling inte bara om att skriva ny kod, utan också om att säkerställa att det som redan finns fortsätter vara stabilt, effektivt och användbart.


Du blir en del av ett företag i stark tillväxt, där det finns goda möjligheter att påverka både teknik, arbetssätt och framtida lösningar. PS Finance Group söker dig som motiveras av att vara med på en utvecklingsresa där initiativ, ansvarstagande och engagemang uppskattas.


Vem vi söker


För PS Finance Group är rätt inställning viktigare än antalet år på CV. Bolaget värdesätter personer som är nyfikna, lösningsorienterade och som vill utvecklas tillsammans med teamet och systemen de arbetar med.


Du har arbetat i en miljö där PHP varit ett centralt programmeringsspråk och känner dig trygg i att utveckla, felsöka och vidareutveckla system. Du trivs med att arbeta fokuserat med kod, men uppskattar också samarbetet med kollegor i andra roller för att förstå behov och hitta välfungerande lösningar.


Rollen innebär även dialog mellan teknik, verksamhet och kund. Därför är det viktigt att du är trygg i kommunikationen och kan bidra med ett professionellt och lösningsfokuserat perspektiv i både interna och externa sammanhang.


Vi ser gärna att du har

* Mycket goda kunskaper inom PHP
* Erfarenhet av MySQL och SQL hantering
* Grundläggande kunskaper inom HTML och CSS
* Erfarenhet av REST API
* God förståelse för webbflöden och backendlogik
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska, både i tal och skrift


Teamet


Du blir en del av ett litet, erfaret och högpresterande team med stark kultur av samarbete, ansvarstagande och kvalitet. Teamet består av olika individer som kompletterar varandra väl och har en gemensam drivkraft att bygga lösningar som fungerar i praktiken.


Hos PS Finance Group får du

* En viktig roll i ett bolag med stark tillväxt och framtidstro
* Möjlighet att påverka teknik, arbetssätt och framtida lösningar
* En nära och prestigelös kultur där människor trivs och utvecklas
* Moderna kontor på Lindholmen med havsutsikt och inspirerande arbetsmiljö
* En arbetsgivare som tar hand om sina medarbetare och värdesätter gemenskap


Om PS Finance Group


PS Finance Group är en snabbfotad och lättrörlig organisation inom finans och fordringshantering. Bolaget är i stark tillväxt och är en del av Confirma Software, en växande mjukvarukoncern.


Hos PS Finance Group blir du en del av en kultur där engagemang, ansvarstagande och gemenskap värderas högt. Det är ett bolag som tar hand om sina medarbetare på riktigt och lägger stor vikt vid att skapa en arbetsmiljö där människor känner sig delaktiga, uppskattade och sedda.


Du sitter i moderna och inspirerande kontor på Lindholmen i Göteborg, med fantastisk utsikt över vattnet. Här arbetar teamet nära varandra, med korta beslutsvägar och en stark vilja att utvecklas tillsammans, både som företag och individer.


Praktisk information


Start: 1 september eller enligt överenskommelse


Omfattning: Heltid, 100 procent


Placering: Lindholmspiren 7, Göteborg


Urval sker löpande, så skicka gärna in din ansökan så snart som möjligt.


Har du frågor om rekryteringsprocessen eller rollen är du varmt välkommen att kontakta Fredrik på Bergvik & Partners via mejl: fredrik.bergvik@bergvikpartners.se


Välkommen med din ansökan.

title: Systemutvecklare med fokus på backend
description:
**Kort om Meepo**
-----------------


Meepo består av 31 tekniknördar med en gemensam drivkraft: att skapa innovativa och omsorgsfulla digitala lösningar som gör skillnad på riktigt. Vi samarbetar med allt från startups till globala bolag och är en pålitlig, nyfiken och kunnig techpartner som bryr sig om helheten.

**Teamet och produkten**
------------------------


För den här rollen kliver du rakt in i team Minso och vårt gäng på elva personer: Erika, Sandra, Henrik, Tim, Frej, Carl, Mattias, Frida, Fredrika, Joakim och Ana Maria! Vi är utvecklare, UX-designers, lösningsarkitekter, testare, produktägare och projektledare med en gemensam kärlek till vår produkt, och ett starkt driv att hela tiden göra den ännu bättre.


Tillsammans försöker vi göra pensionsvärlden lite mindre snårig. Vi bygger en modern, väldesignad och användarvänlig plattform som hjälper människor att förstå och ta kontroll över sitt pensionssparande. Den används redan av flera stora aktörer och gör livet enklare för miljontals användare. Och det bästa, vi är bara i början på vår resa!


Tekniskt då? Vi bygger modulärt, med en och samma kodbas som kan anpassas efter olika kunders behov. Det kräver smart arkitektur, kluriga lösningar och tätt samarbete. Vår stack består bland annat av Java och Vue


Vårt projekt växer och vi behöver nu stärka upp teamet med en systemutvecklare med fokus på backend.

**Rollen som Systemutvecklare**
-------------------------------


Du blir en del av ett erfaret team där du får insyn i hela kedjan, från krav och tekniska vägval till utveckling, test, leverans och vidareutveckling. Du kommer framför allt att arbeta med backendutveckling i Java och Spring Boot. En viktig del av rollen handlar om integrationer och anpassningar i en produkt som används av flera kunder utifrån en gemensam kodbas. Rollen innebär nära samarbete med teamet och löpande dialog med kund.


Exempel på arbetsuppgifter:

* utveckla och vidareutveckla backend
* arbeta med integrationer och tekniska flöden
* utreda och föreslå tekniska lösningar
* felsöka i produktions- och testmiljöer
* bidra i code reviews och lösningsdiskussioner
* hantera och bygga releaser till kund
* delta i arbetsmöten och ha löpande kontakt med kund
* bidra i frågor kring krav, lösningar och leveranser
* ta ansvar för produktens tekniska helhet tillsammans med resten av teamet

**Din bakgrund**
----------------


Vi tror att du har några års erfarenhet av systemutveckling och känner dig trygg i Java och Spring Boot. Du behöver inte kunna allt från start, men vi tror att du trivs i en roll där du får sätta dig in i komplexa system, ställa frågor, ta ansvar och lära dig längs vägen.


För att trivas hos oss tror vi att du:

* har erfarenhet av systemutveckling, gärna i större eller mer komplexa system
* är trygg i Java, Spring Boot och backendutveckling
* har god förståelse för systemdesign och hur tekniska lösningar påverkar helheten
* kan och vill arbeta fullstack när det behövs, även om backend är ditt huvudfokus
* tycker om att samarbeta nära andra utvecklare och roller i teamet
* är bekväm med kundkontakt och kan bidra i dialogen kring krav, lösningar och leveranser
* delar med dig av kunskap och bidrar till teamets gemensamma utveckling
* är nyfiken och driver din egen utveckling framåt


Vi blir extra glada om du dessutom har erfarenhet av något av följande:

* Vue eller annat modernt frontendramverk
* CI/CD
* Gradle
* Git och GitLab
* IntelliJ
* Lumera Core
* SaaS- eller white-label-lösningar
* försäkring, pension eller finans
* AI-stöd i utvecklingsarbetet, till exempel Cursor, Kiro eller liknande verktyg

**Personen vi söker**
---------------------


Vi söker dig som trivs i ett team där samarbete, prestigelöshet och ägandeskap är en naturlig del av vardagen. Du är nyfiken, vill lära dig mer och delar gärna med dig av det du kan till andra.

**Vad du får hos oss**
----------------------

* Ett team där gemenskap, omtanke och glädje inte bara är fina ord, det är så vi jobbar!
* Vi delar på 15 % av vinsten varje år. Går det bra för Meepo, går det bra för alla.
* Du får 50 000 kronor om året i utbildningsbudget, att använda till det du vill lära dig mer om.
* Vi ger 10 % av vinsten till välgörenhet – för att vi vill att vår techkraft ska göra skillnad, även utanför skärmen.
* Tjänstepension, friskvårdsbidrag på 5 000 kronor och dessutom ett gymkort, för att nämna några av alla våra förmåner.
* Vi sitter i fina lokaler i Mariahissen med magisk utsikt över Riddarfjärden och Stadshuset.

**Slutkläm**
------------


Låter det här som något för dig? Hör gärna av dig, oavsett om du är redo att söka eller bara vill veta lite mer. Vi berättar gärna mer om hur vi jobbar och hur det är att vara en del av teamet.

title: Java Developer with AWS
description:
**Java Developer – Cloud & DevOps (Gothenburg)**

**Assignment period:** 22 Jun 2026 – 12 months **Location:** Gothenburg (On‑site, 100%)

**We are looking for a Java Developer with AWS and DevOps expertise**
---------------------------------------------------------------------


We are seeking an experienced and curious Software Engineer who thrives in modern cloud environments and enjoys working with scalable services, DevOps practices, and continuous improvement. You will join a collaborative team where communication, ownership, and teamwork are essential.


This assignment is ideal for someone who enjoys solving complex technical challenges, taking responsibility, and contributing to a positive and open team culture.

**Your responsibilities**
-------------------------

* Develop and deliver high‑quality backend services in Java and/or Python
* Build, improve, and operate cloud solutions in AWS
* Work with DevOps practices, including CI/CD, automation, monitoring, and operational ownership
* Identify AWS cost drivers and contribute to cost‑efficient architecture and operations
* Handle scaling challenges in cloud‑based services
* Participate actively in technical discussions, code reviews, and improvement initiatives
* Contribute to knowledge sharing, quality, and security within the team

**We believe you are**
----------------------

* A problem‑solver who enjoys collaboration
* Communicative, curious, and positive
* Someone who likes sharing knowledge and constructively challenging ideas
* A person who values quality, security, and cost awareness
* A team player who contributes to a strong team spirit

**Requirements**
----------------

* Strong experience with Java and Python
* Solid experience with AWS and cloud‑based services
* Experience with microservices, APIs, distributed systems, or cloud‑native architecture
* Used to working according to DevOps principles
* Experience with CI/CD, automation, monitoring, and operations
* Experience with AWS cost optimization
* Experience handling scaling challenges in cloud environments
* Good understanding of secure and sustainable software development
* Fluent in English, spoken and written

**Meritorious**
---------------

* Experience with MQTT or other event‑/message‑based communication protocols
* Experience with observability, reliability, performance, or security
* Experience working in Agile teams
* Experience collaborating in international or cross‑functional environments

title: Tysktalande integrationsutvecklare
description:
**Om Parkster**
---------------


På Parkster vill vi vara bäst på det vi gör. Vi bygger smart och användarvänlig mjukvara, erbjuder en fantastisk kundservice och strävar efter att vara en riktigt bra arbetsgivare. Vi har kontor i Lund och München, våra tjänster finns på cirka 1400 orter i Sverige, Tyskland och Österrike, och används av hundratusentals människor varje dag. Det hindrar oss inte från att ha ambitiösa tillväxtmål, snarare tvärtom. Tillsammans med kommuner, fastighetsägare och privata aktörer skapar Parkster parkeringslösningar som är smidiga idag och hållbara för framtiden.


På utvecklingsavdelningen är vi i skrivande stund drygt 20 personer. Många har lång erfarenhet, men ingen har tappat lusten att lösa problem och lära sig nya saker tillsammans!

**Om rollen**
-------------


Vi har precis startat ett nytt team vars ansvarsområde är våra produktintegrationer, det vill säga integrationer som vi bygger eller konfigurerar ofta tillsammans med olika kunder eller partners. Några av de vanligaste exemplen är automatisk kameraparkering, elbilsladdning och statistikinsamling.


Teamets uppgift blir till en början att rent praktiskt bygga de integrationer som behövs för stunden, men att på sikt jobba för att ge andra möjlighet att snabbt och enkelt konfigurera upp standardintegrationer utan att blanda in utvecklare över huvud taget.


Detsamma gäller status och hälsa på våra existerande integrationer. Till en början blir teamets uppgift att undersöka och lösa problem, medan den mer långsiktiga ambitionen är att visualisera och larma vid behov så att rätt information når rätt person vid rätt tillfälle. Det kommer att bli en spännande resa!


Till det här teamet söker en junior fullstackutvecklare med god teknisk förståelse, starkt driv, och känsla för affärer.


Vi utgår från kontoret i Lund och värdesätter verkligen gemenskapen på vår arbetsplats. Vill eller behöver man jobba hemma någon dag i veckan finns den möjligheten, men vi tror att du värdesätter fysiska möten och småprat vid kaffemaskinen lika mycket som vi!

**Vem är du?**
--------------


För att lyckas i rollen tror vi att du är en person som:

* **Har en stabil teknisk grund.** Vi har många och komplexa system, så för att kunna ta till dig dem behöver du ha bred kunskap och ha en vilja att förstå på riktigt.
* **Trivs med både människor och maskiner.** Då integrationer alltid innefattar en annan part är det viktigt att du trivs med att träffa potentiella kunder och partners, både fysiskt och digitalt, och att du inte drar dig för att lyfta luren för att få svar på en fråga eller komma vidare med en implementation.
* **Fokuserar på affärsvärde och kundnytta.** Vi vill bygga tekniska lösningar i toppklass, men vi behöver samtidigt lägga vår tid på det som skapar störst värde. Därför är förmågan att utvärdera, prioritera och ompröva väldigt viktig.
* **Är nyfiken på att lära dig.** Du delar med dig av din kunskap och söker feedback från dina kollegor för att hela tiden bli bättre.
* **Kommunicerar på tyska.** Eftersom en stor del av våra nya integrationer sätts upp med motparter i Tyskland och Österrike är det av stort värde om du pratar tyska på en nivå så att du obehindrat kan delta i möten med tysktalande personer.

**Det här jobbar vi med**
-------------------------


Vi lägger ingen prestige i att vara trogna ett visst språk för sakens skull, utan väljer verktyg efter problem. Idag ser vår vardag ut ungefär så här:

* Backend: Java och Kotlin med Spring Boot.
* Frontend: TypeScript, React och Next.js (vi har även Web components och en del legacy JSP).
* Driftsplattform: Kubernetes på Google Cloud (GCP).
* Databaser: Exempelvis BigQuery, MongoDB och MySQL.


Har du koll på den här stacken, eller är motiverad och vass nog för att snabbt sätta dig in i den, kommer du att trivas hos oss!

**Vad vi erbjuder**
-------------------


Vi är ett gäng som drivs av att bygga mjukvara som gör skillnad. Idag är vi över hundra kollegor på våra kontor i Sverige och Tyskland. Vi har ett nära samarbete och en bra gemenskap mellan länder och avdelningar.


Som internationellt tillväxtbolag erbjuder vi ett högt tempo där du får stort utrymme att växa. Här blir du en del av en framåtlutad organisation med korta beslutsvägar och en prestigelös kultur.


Parkster erbjuder bra villkor, inklusive tjänstepension, friskvårdsbidrag, hälsoförsäkring och inte minst en arbetsplats där man har riktigt kul på jobbet.

**Låter det som något för dig?**
--------------------------------


Vi rekryterar löpande och ser fram emot att höra vem du är. Skicka med ditt CV och ett personligt brev där du berättar lite om vad du drivs av. Vi tar gärna emot din ansökan även under sommaren, men i semestertider kan det dröja lite innan du hör tillbaka från oss.


Har du frågor? Kontakta rekryterande chef David Göransson på david.goransson@parkster.com eller utvecklingschef Martin Gunnarsson på martin.gunnarsson@parkster.com.

title: Software Developer - Vehicle Motion Control
description:
**What’s in it for you?**


You will be a software developer in Longitudinal Vehicle Control. The department is responsible for development of control algorithms ensuring the most rewarding and energy efficient longitudinal control of the vehicle. Longitudinal Vehicle Control is coordinating and controlling systems that accelerates and decelerates the vehicle, including propulsion, energy storage and brake systems. You will be a part of a team responsible for developing Core System Platform apps within the scope of the department and delivering to Volvo Cars new Core System VCU. With cross functional cooperation within and outside the department we will support you to reach your full potential. Join us on this exciting journey into the future.

**Your mission**


We are now looking to strengthen one of our team with a Software Developer with experience of C/C++ and embedded software development. The development is considered as low-level and requires good understanding of C++, Linux environment and QNX.

**Who are you**


We seek someone who is open minded and curious with a good ability to cooperate. You have to be self-driven and unafraid of seeking new ways to solve problems. You have good communication skills, and we assume that you communicate fluently in English (speech and writing). You are a technical-minded team player who appreciate to work with different cultures. You have 3-5 years of work experience in the relevant field and a bachelor, Master or PhD degree in engineering.

**Main responsibilities**

* Development of different C++ modules, apps, HALs and services, by using software development kit provided by Volvo’s new Core System Platform.
* Create CI test cases related to the implemented functionality
* Debug, test, and trace during integration
* Synch and cooperate with partners and teams

**Required qualifications**

* At least 3 years of software development (C++, Python)
* Experience with automated software testing/Continuous Integration/Continuous Delivery
* Experience of developing applications using application frameworks and handling life cycle and execution contexts
* Knowledge of distributed electrical systems and electrical architecture
* Experience in test tools such as Wireshark and Canalyzer/CANoe
* Basic understanding of control engineering as you will work closely with control engineers.
* University degree within Computer, Electrical or Applied Physics (Bachelor, Master or PhD)
* Fluent in English (spoken and written)

**Meritorious qualifications**

* Experience in Ethernet communication
* Basic knowledge in base tech areas: Diagnostics, SWDL, Network Communications

title: Backend Developer (TypeScript)
description:
At Qred, we’re building the worlds best bank for small businesses. Since launching 11 years ago, we’ve grown from startup to profitable fintech scale-up, now generating over 1 billion SEK in annual revenue and supporting 50,000+ entrepreneurs across Northern Europe. We combine smart technology, real data, and human judgment to make financing simple, fast, and fair. With bold growth plans and strong momentum across multiple markets, we’re now looking for more Backend Developers for our next phase of growth.

###### **About the Role**


As a Backend Developer at Qred, you will take end-to-end ownership of some systems that power our financial products. You will bridge the gap between technical execution and business impact by building scalable infrastructure while actively contributing to our transition into an agentic-first fintech. This mission-driven role offers the autonomy to implement solutions using agentic AI. This will directly improve the experience of thousands of small businesses.

###### **Key responsibilities**

* Build secure, scalable backend services and third-party integrations that align with our long-term architectural vision.
* Collaborate closely with other engineers to design efficient solution and their implementations.
* Deploy, test, and monitor production code while maintaining proper logging, tracing, and system health dashboards.
* Drive the implementation of AI frameworks and automated agents to shift our platform toward an agentic-first operating model.
* Mitigate technical risk by adhering to compliant engineering practices and acting with urgency on security alerts or production incidents.


Our stack: AWS Serverless, Typescript, Node.js, Claude Code, Grafana, Github Actions.

###### **What we’re looking for**


We are seeking a structured professional who thrives in a collaborative, focused environment and avoids the trap of multitasking. You have the ability to drive alignment across teams, manage a disciplined workflow, and take proactive ownership of complex problem spaces. You are motivated by building scalable frameworks and establishing high engineering maturity within a fast-paced fintech ecosystem.

###### **Qualifications**

* Several years of professional experience in backend software engineering with Typescript.
* Strong knowledge of backend architecture, secure data transferring, and modern cloud environments.
* Practical exposure to using AI models, LLMs, or building automated agentic workflows.

###### **Why Qred?**


This is the place to be if you’re looking for a place to grow. Qred is growing fast, and our Qredsters along with it. With a non-bureaucratic organization and delegated responsibilities, we make sure there’s a short path from idea to action. In addition to our great culture, you get to work with the latest cutting-edge techniques, full ownership, and last but not least a bunch of great competent colleagues to learn from!

###### **One Last Thing**


This is a full-time, permanent position based in our headquarters in Stockholm. We believe our culture thrives when we work closely together, which is why we have an office-first approach. To balance this with some flexibility, we have the option of working remotely one day per week. We review applications on a rolling basis and while the start date is flexible, the right candidate can join us immediately.


Qred celebrates diversity and does not discriminate based on ethnicity, religion, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability status, or any other applicable characteristics protected by law.

  

#LI-Hybrid #LI-JL1

title: Backend Software Engineer
description:
Are you interested in working on exciting challenges within high transaction environments? We are looking for you who are curious, can take initiative and come up with new creative solutions, and care about ultimately delivering a great product.  
 


  

 The Role
   


 Our Engagement Area in Product Development is growing and we are now looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join! Engagement at Betsson Group ensures our customers come back for more. It’s all about loyalty. We provide a world class customer experience beyond the game play featuring Tournaments, Dynamic personalized campaigns and much more! 
 


  


 You will be part of preparing our journey to containerization, increasing the scalability of our systems while also maintaining their high quality. To accommodate new requirements, we are constantly re-evaluating our systems design and working on exciting new features.
 


  

 You have experience in
   

  
* C#, .NET, .NET Core
  
* SQL Server and NoSQL databases
  
* Unit testing frameworks
  
* Messaging within a micro service architecture
  
* Agile development
  
* Collaboration / knowledge-sharing
  


  

 Extra awesome
   

  
* Kafka
  
* Experience in a modern front-end framework (e.g. Angular)
  
* Docker containerization
  
* Domain driven design
  


  

 What’s in it for you?
   


 We can offer you an environment full of ambition and passion. One day is never like the other as the only constant is change, to the better, to the greater. We strive to be the best in whatever field we choose to play on, and we make sure to have fun along the way!
 


  

  
* A friendly, open and humble working environment, where you will have the chance to work alongside with colleagues from all over the world
  
* A chance to evolve your skills together with your colleagues with various programs and initiatives
  
* Personal development through courses, in-house training and external certification
  
* Freedom with responsibility
  


  

 Challenge Accepted?
   


 Check out the Betsson Group Blog to find out what our tech colleagues are talking about.
 


  


 By submitting your application, you understand that your personal data will be processed as set out in our Privacy Policy

title: Fullstack Developer (TypeScript)
description:
At Qred, we’re building the worlds best bank for small businesses. Since launching 11 years ago, we’ve grown from startup to profitable fintech scale-up, now generating over 1 billion SEK in annual revenue and supporting 50,000+ entrepreneurs across Northern Europe. We combine smart technology, real data, and human judgment to make financing simple, fast, and fair. With bold growth plans and strong momentum across multiple markets, we’re now looking for more Fullstack Developers for the next phase of growth.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Fullstack Developer at Qred, you will take end-to-end ownership of features that directly impact our users, fluidly transitioning between frontend and backend systems based on team priorities. You will bridge the gap between technical execution and business impact by building scalable financial systems while ensuring a seamless, high-performance user experience. This mission-driven role offers the autonomy to solve complex engineering problems and deliver immediate value to our product ecosystem.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Build secure, scalable backend services, web/mobile user interfaces, and third-party integrations.
* Collaborate with designers and peer engineers to plan efficient data flows, endpoints, and optimal client experiences.
* Deploy, test, and monitor production code while maintaining proper logging, tracing, and system health dashboards.
* Drive technical initiatives within our client platforms, ensuring shared frontend practices remain scalable and unified.
* Mitigate technical risk by adhering to compliant engineering practices and managing a disciplined workflow to maintain delivery momentum.


 Our stack: AWS Serverless, Typescript, Node.js, React, React Native, Claude Code, Grafana, Github Actions.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
 We are seeking a structured professional who thrives on architectural variety and can drive alignment across both frontend and backend domains. You possess strong self-leadership, manage your workflow by focusing on closing active tasks, and avoid the efficiency traps of multi-tasking. You are motivated by building scalable frameworks and establishing high engineering maturity within a fast-paced fintech ecosystem.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Several years of professional experience in software engineering using TypeScript.
* Strong knowledge of modern cloud environments, secure data transferring, and building scalable web or mobile client platforms.
* Practical exposure to using AI models, LLMs, or building automated agentic workflows.


**Why Qred?**
 This is the place to be if you’re looking for a place to grow. Qred is growing fast, and our Qredsters along with it. With a non-bureaucratic organization and delegated responsibilities, we make sure there’s a short path from idea to action. In addition to our great culture, you get to work with the latest cutting-edge techniques, full ownership, and last but not least a bunch of great competent colleagues to learn from!
   

  

**One Last Thing**
 This is a full-time, permanent position based in our headquarters in Stockholm. We believe our culture thrives when we work together, which is why we have an office-first approach. To balance this with some flexibility, we have the option of working remotely one day per week. We review applications on a rolling basis and while the start date is flexible, the right candidate can join us immediately.
   

  

*Qred celebrates diversity and does not discriminate based on ethnicity, religion, national origin, gender, sexua* 
*l orientation, age, disability status, or any other applicable characteristics protected by law.*
 Qred is an international FinTech scale-up that specializes in digital financing solutions for small businesses, with operations in the Nordics, Benelux, Germany and Brazil. We are passionate about helping small businesses thrive and grow, by providing them with business loans and credit cards. Right now we’re in an exciting phase of our journey that focuses on growth through smart product development and technology fueled by international expansion.

title: Software Engineer
description:
**Är du en backend-utvecklare som vill vara med och skapa framtidens digitala bankupplevelse tillsammans med andra som brinner för teknik och samhällsnytta?**
 Avanza söker nu en engagerad utvecklare som vill vara med och forma nästa generations digitala tjänster för sparande, investeringar och bank. Hos oss kombineras teknikintresse med samhällsengagemang, i team där gemenskap, samarbete och inkludering är en självklar del av vardagen. Vi tror på ett arbetsliv där det går att vara både ambitiös och mänsklig, där balans och meningsfullhet är lika viktiga som innovation.
   

  

 Om rollen
   

  

 Som Software Engineer hos oss på Avanza blir du en nyckelspelare i en av Sveriges mest spännande teknikresor. Vi har påbörjat en omfattande molntransformering mot Google Cloud Platform (GCP). Vårt mål är tydligt: Till 2030 ska vi huvudsakligen vara helt molnbaserade och under 2026 växlar vi upp tempot rejält med målsättningen att migrera över 100 tjänster.
   

  

 Du kommer att tillhöra ett av våra 45 autonoma team där du jobbar nära din Product Manager och dina designers. Våra team arbetar med Order Management System, strömmad data, höga transaktionsvolymer, datadriven utveckling och Machine Learning. Beroende på vilket team du landar i kommer din vardag handla om allt från att vidareutveckla vår högpresterande on-prem-miljö till att bryta ny mark i molnet. Du får vara med och sätta standarden för hur vi modellerar data och bygger skalbara tjänster i en modern molnmiljö.
   

  

 Din tekniska vardag
   

  

 Vi Rör Oss Från En Arkitektur Byggd På Gigaspaces Och Interna Plattformar Mot En Modern, Molnbaserad Stack. Där Kommer Du Att Arbeta Med
   

  

* Java som huvudspråk för våra mikrotjänster
* GCP som vår framtida hemvist, där vi bygger för hög tillgänglighet och skalbarhet
* Modern datamodellering i molnet, med Google Spanner för applikationsdata och BigQuery för data warehousing
* Kommunikation via gRPC och händelsestyrda flöden med Kafka


 Vem är du?
   

  

 Vi söker dig som älskar problemlösning och som vill bygga system som gör skillnad för över två miljoner kunder. I rollen som utvecklare gillar du att dela med dig av dina kunskaper och du lockas av utmaningen i att migrera komplexa system till molnet.
   

  

 Som person ser vi att du är en nyfiken och kommunikativ lagspelare som trivs bäst när du får lösa komplexa problem tillsammans med andra. Du tar stort ansvar för den tekniska kvaliteten och drivs av att skriva välstrukturerad, testbar och skalbar kod, samtidigt som du också har ett naturligt helhetstänk, där du vill bidra till både teamets arbetssätt och produktens utveckling.
   

  

 På Avanza får du en kultur som präglas av prestigelöshet, en miljö där det är självklart att fråga samt dela med sig av kunskap och där vi ser varje utmaning eller misslyckande som en möjlighet att lära oss och växa tillsammans.
   

  

 Vi tror att du
   

  

* Har minst 4 års relevant arbetslivserfarenhet
* Har gedigen erfarenhet av att bygga och underhålla distribuerade system och API:er i Java
* Har erfarenhet av att utveckla och driftsätta tjänster i molnmiljö (Cloud Native)
* Förstår och kan läsa svenska obehindrat


 Det är meriterande om du har
   

  

* Erfarenhet av Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
* Erfarenhet av molnbaserade databaser såsom Google Spanner och/eller analytiska plattformar som BigQuery, gärna med dbt för datatransformering
* Erfarenhet av vår nuvarande stack (t.ex. Gigaspaces eller liknande in-memory-lösningar) för att hjälpa oss i bryggan mellan on-prem och moln
* Vana av att jobba med händelsestyrd arkitektur (Kafka)


 En kultur för gemenskap och hållbarhet
   

  

 Vi tror att de bästa resultaten uppstår i trygga team där alla får komma till tals. Därför lägger vi stor vikt vid samarbete, öppenhet och arbetsglädje. Vi strävar efter jämställda team där alla känner sig trygga att vara sig själva och bidra med sin unika kompetens. Hos oss får du utrymme att utvecklas i din egen takt och kombinera arbetet med ett hållbart liv.
   

  

 Ansökan
   

  

 Skicka din ansökan genom att klicka på knappen ”Ansök” nedan. Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande.
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

*Erbjudanden från rekryteringsföretag/annonssäljare undanbedes.*
 Avanza är Sveriges ledande plattform för sparande och placeringar. Vi drivs av att förändra branschen genom att utmana de stora bankerna och försäkringsbolagen på den svenska sparmarknaden. Vi vill vara tjänsten som förenklar och förbättrar spararnas ekonomi, oavsett om man älskar aktier eller bara vill ha ett bra sparande. Vår vision är att skapa en bättre framtid för miljoner människor. Därför står våra kunders bästa alltid i fokus, precis som det borde vara. Affärsidén är enkel – mer till dig, mindre till banken. En idé som gett oss Sveriges nöjdaste sparare 15 år i rad.

title: Software Engineer - Ad Capabilities
description:
ProdDev: ProdDev Global Engineering
   

  

* Stockholm


 Software Engineer - Ad Capabilities
   

  

****About Acast****
 Since 2014, Acast has been building the world’s most valuable podcast marketplace, creating the technology that connects podcast creators, advertisers, and listeners. Its marketplace spans more than 140,000 podcasts, 3,300 advertisers, and one billion quarterly listens. Crucially, those listens are monetized wherever they happen—across any podcast app or listening platform.
   

  

****About The Role****
 In just a few seconds, Acast’s Dynamic Ad Insertion platform dynamically sources, selects, and splices ads into uniquely personalised streams for millions of listens every day, all while optimising towards the best possible return for the creator, advertiser, and of course the listener themselves.
   

  

 As a Software Engineer in Delivery, you’ll be working in the team that owns Acast’s audience indexing and contextual targeting capabilities to ensure the right ad gets served to the right audience, on the right podcast. You’ll also work on Ad Manager, our internal campaign booking system, where sales and operations teams plan campaigns, configure targeting, and manage flights and creatives end to end. That means building and improving the tools that turn audience and content signals into bookable inventory — from how campaigns are set up and targeted, to how they stay in sync with delivery and reporting downstream.
   

  

 Your daily responsibilities are centered around development of our ad manager and targeting capabilities. You will collaborate with a team of data and software engineers, an Engineering Manager and a Product Manager, to plan and execute on innovative solutions that have a significant impact on our business.
   

  

****What You'll Do****
 You will work in an experienced team that is distributed across Europe.
   

  

 In collaboration with your team you will maintain and develop targeting capabilities, while also communicating and collaborating with peer teams and both internal and external stakeholders.
   

  

 While the campaign booking system is the team's primary focus, you’ll also be working on our audience indexing and targeting capabilities .
   

  

 The team owns critical services as part of Acast’s Ad Delivery pipeline , and you will be expected to join the rotation providing 24 hour on-call support for this.
   

  

****Who You Are****
 We believe you are a software engineer who’s early in their career, with a focus on front-end development but have an interest for the full stack. You enjoy solving problems and seek to understand the business needs around the things you build and support. You’re able to work alone or as a pair, and believe direct collaboration is the best way to solve problems. You believe AI is here to accelerate us and use it in your day-to-day work.
   

  

 You are creatively solving problems using Node, TypeScript and React, or similar.
   

  

 You are comfortable with or willing to learn AWS and understand the value of healthy CI/CD pipelines.
   

  

**Location**
 Most of our teams are hybrids with some members co-located in offices and some working fully remote. With a remote first way of working we want you to feel productive regardless of work location.
   

  

 For this role, you can be based in the UK or Sweden. We have offices in London and Stockholm but it is optional if you want to work remote or at the office.
   

  

**Culture**
 Acast is committed to creating a diverse environment and is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment regardless of race, gender, sexual orientation, religion, ethnicity, national origin or any of the other wonderful characteristics that make us different.
   

  

 Culture is our number one priority as a business. We believe people come first, and we work every day to enable autonomy, continuous improvement and bring out the best in people. We’re global and have remote teams, so it’s even more important that we strive for an open, inclusive and caring environment where everyone feels visible and welcome.
   

  

 We consider ourselves a modern organization driven by strong values to create the best, most fulfilling and nurturing culture.
   

  

 We very much look forward to finding the next great person to join our cause!
   

  

 Department ProdDev: ProdDev Global Engineering Locations Stockholm Employment type Full-time
   

  

**About Acast**
 Acast is the world's leading independent podcast company, elevating podcast creators & podcast advertisers for the ultimate listening experience.
   

  

 Founded in 2011
   

  

 Coworkers About 500

title: Backend Developer (TypeScript)
description:
At Qred, we’re building the worlds best bank for small businesses. Since launching 11 years ago, we’ve grown from startup to profitable fintech scale-up, now generating over 1 billion SEK in annual revenue and supporting 50,000+ entrepreneurs across Northern Europe. We combine smart technology, real data, and human judgment to make financing simple, fast, and fair. With bold growth plans and strong momentum across multiple markets, we’re now looking for more Backend Developers for our next phase of growth.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Backend Developer at Qred, you will take end-to-end ownership of some systems that power our financial products. You will bridge the gap between technical execution and business impact by building scalable infrastructure while actively contributing to our transition into an agentic-first fintech. This mission-driven role offers the autonomy to implement solutions using agentic AI. This will directly improve the experience of thousands of small businesses.
   

  

 Key responsibilities
   

  

* Build secure, scalable backend services and third-party integrations that align with our long-term architectural vision.
* Collaborate closely with other engineers to design efficient solution and their implementations.
* Deploy, test, and monitor production code while maintaining proper logging, tracing, and system health dashboards.
* Drive the implementation of AI frameworks and automated agents to shift our platform toward an agentic-first operating model.
* Mitigate technical risk by adhering to compliant engineering practices and acting with urgency on security alerts or production incidents.


 Our stack: AWS Serverless, Typescript, Node.js, Claude Code, Grafana, Github Actions.
   

  

 What we’re looking for
   

  

 We are seeking a structured professional who thrives in a collaborative, focused environment and avoids the trap of multitasking. You have the ability to drive alignment across teams, manage a disciplined workflow, and take proactive ownership of complex problem spaces. You are motivated by building scalable frameworks and establishing high engineering maturity within a fast-paced fintech ecosystem.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Several years of professional experience in backend software engineering with Typescript.
* Strong knowledge of backend architecture, secure data transferring, and modern cloud environments.
* Practical exposure to using AI models, LLMs, or building automated agentic workflows.


 Why Qred?
   

  

 This is the place to be if you’re looking for a place to grow. Qred is growing fast, and our Qredsters along with it. With a non-bureaucratic organization and delegated responsibilities, we make sure there’s a short path from idea to action. In addition to our great culture, you get to work with the latest cutting-edge techniques, full ownership, and last but not least a bunch of great competent colleagues to learn from!
   

  

 One Last Thing
   

  

 This is a full-time, permanent position based in our headquarters in Stockholm. We believe our culture thrives when we work closely together, which is why we have an office-first approach. To balance this with some flexibility, we have the option of working remotely one day per week. We review applications on a rolling basis and while the start date is flexible, the right candidate can join us immediately.
   

  

 Qred celebrates diversity and does not discriminate based on ethnicity, religion, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability status, or any other applicable characteristics protected by law.
   

  

  

  

 Qred is an international FinTech scale-up that specializes in digital financing solutions for small businesses, with operations in the Nordics, Benelux, Germany and Brazil. We are passionate about helping small businesses thrive and grow, by providing them with business loans and credit cards. Right now we’re in an exciting phase of our journey that focuses on growth through smart product development and technology fueled by international expansion.

title: Frontend leaning Fullstack developer
description:
We are looking for a Senior Fullstack Engineer to join Data Platform. Our team is building a new platform service focused on improving data quality across the data applications and analytics platform. The team also owns the Event Sender SDK and is responsible for maintaining, and supporting the internal users who rely on it. We are looking for a platform engineer specialized in JavaScript/TypeScript and backend development(Java), to help build services, APIs, SDKs, and internal tools that enable engineers to produce high-quality and reliable data at scale.
   

  

 As part of this team, you will closely collaborate with our internal customers (e.g. application developers, data consumers, analytics engineers, and platform teams) to understand their needs and deliver scalable solutions that improve the quality, reliability, and usability of our data ecosystem.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Work in a fast-paced environment to build services and internal tools that improve data quality across our data ecosystem
* Collaborate with other engineers, data scientists, designers, user researchers and product managers to craft the best possible user experience for our internal tools and platform services
* Partner closely with internal users to provide support, gather feedback, and continuously improve the developer experience
* Ensure the developer experience is seamless for all engineers using our platform.


**Who you are**
* You are experienced with modern JavaScript coding, testing, debugging, and automation techniques
* You are proficient in some of the following: JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Java
* You are passionate about building a great developer experience through robust APIs, SDKs, and platform services
* You have a quality mindset and are interested in all parts of software development: coding, testing, deployment, monitoring, and operational excellence
* You are comfortable around infrastructure and have some Java coding experience
* You care about the user experience and know how to build user-friendly web applications
* You have experience with some of the following areas: GCP, Kubernetes, GRPC, protobuf, large-scale data pipelines, data quality, or analytics platforms


 Start/end: 2026-07-13 to 2027-01-12
   

  

 Workplace: Stockholm Sweden

title: Tech Lead
description:
*Want to influence the bigger picture? At Saab, you can realise amazing innovations that keep people and societies safe. Together, we can truly make an impact – and your part matters.*
**Your role**
 At Saab, we operate in an increasingly complex and rapidly evolving security environment where software, cloud, automation, and digital infrastructure are becoming critical enablers of operational superiority and mission readiness. As Saab continues its international growth journey, technology plays a central role in strengthening resilience, accelerating innovation, and enabling next-generation defense capabilities across all operational domains.
   

  

 Modern defense systems demand scalable, secure, and resilient digital platforms capable of operating across cloud, edge, and disconnected environments. The ability to rapidly develop, integrate, deploy, and evolve software-defined capabilities is becoming a decisive factor in maintaining technological and operational advantage.
   

  

 Within Saab Technology, we are accelerating:
   

  

* Digitalization of products and engineering workflows
* Cloud-native and software-defined platforms
* Cyber-secure and resilient operational environments
* Advanced capabilities within automation, AI, edge computing, and space technologies
* Modern engineering cultures built on collaboration, ownership, and continuous improvement


 As a Tech Lead, you will play a key role in driving the technical direction and execution of mission-critical platforms and engineering initiatives. You will combine deep technical expertise with leadership, coaching, and strategic thinking to help teams build secure, scalable, and operationally resilient solutions.
   

  

 You will work closely with engineers, architects, product owners, security specialists, and operational stakeholders to ensure that Saab’s platforms and software capabilities meet the highest standards of security, performance, reliability, and maintainability.
   

  

**Your main responsibilities include:**
* Leading the technical direction for cloud-native and mission-critical platform solutions
* Driving architecture, design decisions, and engineering best practices across teams
* Enabling secure, scalable, and resilient Kubernetes-based environments across public, private, hybrid, and edge infrastructures
* Supporting and mentoring engineers within DevSecOps, Platform Engineering, and software development practices
* Driving automation and modern software delivery through CI/CD pipelines and Infrastructure as Code (IaC)
* Collaborating with architects, security teams, and operational stakeholders to ensure alignment between technical solutions and operational requirements
* Identifying technical risks, bottlenecks, and dependencies while proactively driving mitigation strategies
* Contributing to platform modernization, operational readiness, and long-term technical strategy
* Supporting the development of reusable platform capabilities, golden paths, and engineering standards
* Ensuring that systems are designed for scalability, observability, maintainability, and security from the ground up


 You will be part of the Container & Cloud Platforms section within Common Tech - a specialized organization responsible for enabling modern digital platforms, cloud capabilities, and strategic technology transformation across Saab.
   

  

**Your profile**
 You are a senior engineer or technical leader with strong experience in cloud-native technologies, platform engineering, and modern software delivery. You enjoy combining hands-on technical work with leadership and coaching, and you are motivated by solving complex challenges in high-impact and mission-critical environments.
   

  

 You are proactive, collaborative, and structured in your way of working, and you thrive in environments where technical excellence, operational reliability, and teamwork are essential.
   

  

 You understand how to balance:
   

  

* innovation and governance
* speed and resilience
* autonomy and standardization


 …within large-scale and security-sensitive organizations.
   

  

**Required skills and experience:**
* Strong experience with Kubernetes and container orchestration platforms
* Deep understanding of cloud-native architectures and modern platform engineering
* Experience with DevSecOps, CI/CD pipelines, and automation frameworks
* Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using technologies such as Terraform or Ansible
* Experience working with public cloud and hybrid cloud environments
* Strong understanding of observability, monitoring, and logging platforms such as Prometheus and Grafana
* Experience leading technical initiatives and guiding engineering teams
* Strong analytical, troubleshooting, and problem-solving capabilities
* Fluent in Swedish and English, both written and spoken


**Additional valuable experience:**
* Experience from defense, aerospace, telecom, industrial, or other mission-critical industries
* Knowledge of Zero Trust architectures and cloud security principles
* Experience with edge computing or disconnected operational environments
* Agile software development and scaled engineering organizations
* Experience with networking, storage, virtualization, and resilient infrastructure platforms
* Understanding of software factories, platform ecosystems, or developer enablement strategies


**What you will help enable:**
* Faster and more secure software delivery
* Operationally resilient digital platforms
* Cloud-to-edge capabilities for future operational systems
* Scalable engineering environments supporting innovation at speed
* Modern platform foundations enabling Saab’s future digital and operational capabilities


*This position requires that you pass a security vetting based on the current regulations around/of security protection. For positions requiring security clearance additional obligations on citizenship may apply.*
**What You Will Be Part Of**
 Explore a wealth of possibilities. Take on challenges, create smart inventions, and grow beyond. This is a place for curious minds, brave pioneers, and everyone in between. Together, we achieve the extraordinary, each bringing our unique perspectives. Your part matters.
   

  

 Saab is a leading defense and security company with an enduring purpose, to help nations keep their people and society safe. Empowered by its 28,000 talented people, Saab constantly pushes the boundaries of technology to create a safer and more sustainable world.
   

  

 Saab designs, manufactures and maintains advanced systems in aeronautics, weapons, command and control, sensors and underwater systems. Saab is headquartered in Sweden. It has major operations all over the world and is part of the domestic defense capability of several nations. Read more about us here

title: Senior Web Developer - Growth
description:
**Why This Role Matters**
 Funnel’s website is our primary growth channel. It’s where potential customers first understand our value, build trust, and decide whether to take the next step. In this role, you’ll own and evolve that experience- building high-quality web interactions that directly impact conversion, lead quality, and revenue.
   

  

 You’ll work on a modern, AI-powered product used by marketers and brands worldwide, and your work will shape how it’s discovered, understood, and adopted. You’ll also work with colleagues who actively leverage AI tooling to ideate, design, code, and ship faster.
   

  

**About The Role**
 This is a hands-on role for a frontend-focused engineer who wants to work close to the business impact of what they build. You’ll take ownership of Funnel’s marketing site as a product building, iterating, and continuously improving it through experimentation.
   

  

 You’ll work closely with marketing, product, and revenue teams to ship quickly, test ideas, and turn traffic into meaningful customer conversations.
   

  

 You will work closely to these wonderfully smart and kind people: Marketa, Thomas, and Elias.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Build and maintain Funnel’s marketing website using modern frontend technologies
* Develop high-quality, performant, and accessible web experiences that reflect our product and brand
* Run and ship experiments on a continuous basis to improve conversion rates and user engagement
* Collaborate with marketing and product teams to launch new pages, campaigns, and features within days, not weeks
* Set up and work with tracking (e.g. events, funnels) to measure performance and evaluate experiment outcomes
* Iterate on landing pages, signup flows, and interactive elements based on data and user insights
* Use modern AI tools to accelerate how you design, build, and iterate on web experiences
* Explore and implement AI-powered features or experiences (e.g. interactive demos, personalization, or content generation) where it creates real user value
* Contribute to improving how we work with experimentation, tooling, and web performance


**Skills & Experience We’re Looking For**
* At least 5 years of experience working in a web or frontend development role/s
* Strong frontend engineering skills with experience in React, TypeScript, HTML, and CSS
* Experience building and maintaining modern, production-grade web applications
* Hands-on experience working with experimentation, A/B testing, or data-driven improvements in a web or product environment
* Comfortable using data (e.g. event tracking, funnels, analytics tools) to guide decisions and evaluate impact
* Experience working with APIs, integrations, and backend services (e.g. Node.js, cloud environments like AWS)
* Experience and excitement leveraging AI tools in day-to-day development workflows (e.g. code generation, debugging, prototyping), and curious about how AI can enhance user experiences
* Ability to turn ideas into shipped features quickly, with a focus on quality, performance, and iteration


**Nice to Haves**
* Experience working in growth or marketing-focused teams
* Familiarity with analytics and experimentation tools
* Knowledge of SEO and web performance optimization
* Experience from fast-growing B2B SaaS companies or agencies


**Our Ways of Working**
 We organize our work around domains and workstreams instead of traditional teams. Domains define clear areas of ownership, while workstreams form around shared goals and outcomes. This way of working helps us reduce dependencies, collaborate more naturally, and move faster with greater autonomy. We focus on delivering meaningful impact, learning through iteration, and continuously improving together. Read more about how we work →
   

  

 Good to know
   

  

* This role is based in Stockholm, Sweden
* We are an office-first company and work from the office at least 4 days per week. With flexibility of course!
* At this time, we can only consider applicants who:
+ Hold Swedish citizenship, or
+ Hold EU/EEA citizenship and are currently residing in Stockholm, or
+ Hold a valid Swedish work permit

* We do not offer relocation support for this role


 The Hiring Process
   

  

* Screening call – you get to know us, we get to know you! We're interested in hearing what you have been working on, and how your experience aligns with what we are looking for. We will share more context about the role, team and company and welcome any of your questions.
* Technical interviews – onsite deep dive into your technical experience, hands on coding and problem-solving approach
* Offer!


**About Funnel**
 Funnel is the leading Marketing Intelligence platform that empowers marketers to automatically integrate, attribute, measure, and report on data from over 600 marketing platforms.
   

  

 Trusted by more than 3,000 customers worldwide—including globally recognized brands such as Adidas, The Home Depot, Uber, Gong, Skechers, and Sony, as well as leading agencies like Havas, Power Digital, and Publicis—Funnel generated over $57M in ARR in 2024.
   

  

 Since its founding in 2014, Funnel has grown into a global team of over 300 employees, with offices in Stockholm, Boston, Hamburg, and Sydney. Funnel continues to feature in the FT 1000 list of Europe’s fastest-growing companies.
   

  

 Funnel is the leading Marketing Intelligence platform that empowers marketers to automatically integrate, attribute, measure, and report on data from over 500 marketing platforms.
   

  

 Trusted by almost 3,000 businesses worldwide, including globally recognized brands such as Adidas and Sony, Funnel generated over $70M in ARR in 2025 and continues to feature in the FT 1000 list of Europe’s fastest-growing companies.
   

  

 Since its founding in 2014, Funnel has grown into a global team of over 300 employees, with offices in Stockholm, Boston, Hamburg, and Sydney.

title: Founding AI Engineer
description:
Corafone is hiring their
 
**Founding AI Engineer** 

 , and this role is truly unique.
 




  






 Have you been dreaming about being part of a fast growing company, where your contribution really makes a difference?
 





 Where you can challenge yourself to build something unique?
 





 Well then
 
**Corafone might be the place for you** 

 .
 




  






 The debt collection industry is still mired in technical debt, manual processes, and disjointed consumer journeys. And no one has solved it yet, despite managing billions in unpaid invoices every year and millions of consumers' personal finances.
 




  






 Corafone is reshaping the industry by deploying state-of-the-art AI voice agents on behalf of our clients in the US. We are building a full-stack AI-native company in the debt collection industry and thereby using the technology we develop ourselves.
 




  






 We are looking for brilliant minds who want to contribute and own our technical setup, who knows how to build scalable systems and wants to be part of something big.
 




  





**Why Corafone?** 



* Founding team that has built companies before and knows what it takes
* Backed by leading Silicon Valley VCs like:  
 
**Boost VC** 

 (Coinbase, Deepgram), 
 
**Theory Forge VC** 

 (Moltbook founders), 
 
**Shanda Group** 

 (8bn dollar AUM)
* The company was founded 2025 but has already collected >$5m with >550 000 voice agent calls and less than 0.01% failrate. This is your chance to impact and shape where this goes.



  





**What you'll do** 



* Build and own AI voice agents that conduct calls, payments and abide by guidelines
* Plan and build foundational system architecture
* Work closely with clients in an industry where trust is everything
* Be part of important strategical technical decisions



  





**Who you are** 



* Experienced fullstack developer (typescript) with strong intuition for system design
* Proven experience building AI-agents or LLMs in production
* Previous experience of understanding and solving clients problems preferably with AI
* You want to build something big, and not just a regular 9-5 job
* You care as much about the outcome as how it is solved
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English



  





**Positive** 



* You have been a part of an early stage startup
* You have built and launched your own products
* You have built and deployed AI voice solutions



  





**What you will get** 



* Be part of the founding team in a fast-growing tech startup with global ambitions
* Be early enough to be able to influence the product, culture, and direction
* Ownership on seed stage terms, before the valuation catches up to what we are building
* Join a world-class tech company from the Nordics
* Company perks: top notch equipment, access to latest AI tools, gym and breakfast included, and more

title: Software Engineer - Voice
description:
**Are you ready to be at the bleeding edge of Voice AI, building systems that handle millions of real conversations per month where every millisecond counts?** 




  





 At boost.ai, we are currently scaling up our Voice team. 2026 is the year of Voice!
 



  





 With a steady 15-20% YoY growth rate at boost.ai, we are the go-to Conversational AI provider for regulated sectors such as finance, the public sector, insurance, and telecom, and we are expanding into many more industries, including healthcare.
 



  





 We are not just another "wrapper" that popped up overnight.
 



  





 We are a bona fide AI and Data Science company that has been pioneering machine learning since 2016.
 



  





 Today, we are building a voice-first platform where millions of conversations will run through, and more than 600 of our virtual agents are live across EMEA and North America. Enterprises like Tryg, DNB, Telenor, and Nordea trust us with their customers.
 



  





**By joining us, you are stepping into the core of a central, rapidly growing player in the global AI space.** 




  





 You won't be building theoretical demos or waiting on roadmap slides.
 



 You would be joining early enough to genuinely shape it, and established enough that real customers are already depending on what you ship.
 



  





 Our team is diverse, dedicated, and a little bit obsessed with getting voice right, and we work hard to make sure everyone here can do the best work of their career.
 



  





 You will be on the bleeding edge, solving some of the hardest engineering challenges in low-latency computing and genuinely shaping a product that ships directly to massive global enterprises.
 



  





**The Challenge: Zero Forgiveness** 




 Voice is our biggest bet and fastest-growing product. We are building a smart, real-time voice assistant at the absolute forefront of what is possible.
 



  





 Your mission will be to take on
 **genuinely hard problems** 
 : real-time, low-latency, and accurate voice at enterprise scale, multi-provider LLM routing, and deep telephony integration.
 



  





 There is zero tolerance for latency or computing delays from users. It is a hard, fast-moving problem space, but this is the kind of engineering where the constraints are real, and the wins are deeply satisfying.
 



  





**Where you can work:** 




**This role is hybrid and based in one of our European offices:** 
 Copenhagen, Oslo, Stavanger, Stockholm, Helsinki, or London.
 



  





***Note:***
*Eligibility to live and work in the Nordics or the UK is required. We are not able to support relocation from outside this region or fully remote arrangements for this position* 




  





**What you will be doing** 




 We are looking for a Software Engineer to help take our voice platform to the next level, so
 **you will have a high impact on genuinely shaping the architecture of our voice-first platform, with the autonomy and trust to make a tangible difference.** 




  





 You will be working closely with the brightest minds in our Voice, Core Platform, ML, and Customer Excellence teams to bring cutting-edge multimodal conversational AI to the world.
 



  





**You will** 



* **Build and operate the voice platform:**



 Develop and scale the core of our real-time voice platform, including WebRTC media handling, STT/TTS orchestration, and production-grade observability.
 



  




* **Own real-time LLM routing:**



 Evolve our multi-region routing layer for voice (OpenAI Realtime, Azure OpenAI, etc.), engineering explicit trade-offs between cost, latency, and quality.
 



  




* **Pioneer voice-native features:**



 Lead new voice capabilities such as barge-in, interruption handling, language switching, voice billing, and the voice side of our avatar pipelines.
 



  




* **Shape the architecture:**



 Contribute to platform-level decisions on inference, multi-region deployment, and integration with CCaaS and telephony providers.
 



  




* **Raise the bar on automation:**



 Champion strong testing, CI/CD, and observability for a latency-critical workload where even small regressions are immediately visible to customers.
 



  





**What we expect from you** 




**Requirements (The Non-Negotiables):** 



* 5+ years of experience working with Python, SQL, and API integrations in production systems.
* Hands-on experience deploying, operating, and troubleshooting high-availability services on AWS or Azure using modern CI/CD pipelines.
* A degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent practical experience.
* Fluent in English



  





**Blow us away (Nice-to-haves):** 



* Comfort with the realities of low-latency systems. You know how to debug latency tails, handle back-pressure, and design for network instability.
* Experience with one or more of WebRTC, telephony integrations, CCaaS platforms, speech systems, or other real-time communication systems
* Prior experience in voice or conversational AI is a significant advantage.
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills, essential for working with diverse teams, customers, and partners across multiple disciplines.
* A keen interest in the fast-evolving world of conversational and voice AI.



  





**The Team & Perks** 




 We work hard on tough challenges, but
 **fun is one of our actual core values.** 




 We are an opinionated, high-trust team that celebrates wins together (our annual Boost Camp every October is a massive highlight!).
 



  





 To back you up, we offer a comprehensive range of employee benefits designed to support your overall well-being and allow you to do the absolute best work of your career.
 



  





**Ready to build the future of Voice AI?** 




 We would love to hear from you.
 



 If you have any questions about the role or the tech stack before applying, feel free to reach out to our recruitment partner,
 **Casper Skyum Høgh** 
 , at
 **csh@ing.dk** 
 , who is leading the search for this position.

title: Senior Agentic NetSuite Developer
description:
**Join our global force of 400+ innovators, blending the latest in tech with the greatest in soundtracking, from our Stockholm HQ to offices in London, New York, Los Angeles, Berlin, Paris, Oslo, and Seoul. We’re an industry leader with a startup mentality. We take what we do seriously, but we don’t take ourselves too seriously. Creating and collaborating to transform the sound of streaming, content, and culture. Come join us, and let the world** 
***feel***
**your work.**
 As a Senior Agentic NetSuite Developer, you will play a crucial role in the Financial Systems team that owns the systems running Epidemic Sound's financial backbone. Your role will be to set the technical direction for our NetSuite platform, lead the architecture that connects it to the rest of our business, and shape how AI and agentic tooling change the way ERP work gets done here.
   

  

 This focus on AI and agentic tools is central to our broader strategy of accelerating the company’s transformation toward smarter, more scalable ways-of-working by embedding agentic AI at the core of business operations and system development.
   

  

 You'll Work At The Intersection Of Tech And Finance, Where The Systems You Build Directly Affect How Reliably We Close The Books, Run Controls, And Scale Operations As The Company Grows. Specifically
   

  

* This role drives the modernisation of our ERP platform and integration landscape, ensuring Finance, Tech, and operational teams can move quickly on a foundation that's accurate, compliant, and built for scale.
* Your work will reduce manual effort across financial processes, raise the bar on data integrity and audit-readiness, and define how we adopt AI capabilities inside NetSuite and beyond.
* You'll join a small, senior team of ERP, CRM and Data engineers focused on internal business systems. It's a team that values craft, ownership, and clear technical judgement over process for its own sake, and which uses modern data tooling to optimise performance and scalability.
* You'll collaborate closely with engineers across the Tech organisation, the Finance team (Accounting, FP&A, Controlling), Procurement, and external implementation partners — communicating directly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders without translation layers in between.
* In collaboration with the team you will assess the technical problems, design best-practice solutions, and determine the appropriate implementation approach—whether through NetSuite development, configuration, or external systems (e.g., the pre-system data platform).


**Your Key Responsibilities Include**
* Owning and evolving our NetSuite platform and AI strategy — directing AI-assisted development to accelerate delivery and reduce manual configuration, while maintaining a clear point of view on which of NetSuite's emerging AI capabilities and third-party agentic tools we should adopt and when.
* Designing agentic workflows where AI handles repetitive financial processes — reconciliations, approvals, data routing — end-to-end, with appropriate human oversight built in.
* Leading integration architecture across NetSuite and adjacent systems, acting as technical lead and quality reviewer for AI-generated scripts, integrations, and automations.
* Driving compliance and continuous improvement, using AI-assisted analysis to proactively surface data integrity issues, audit risks, and optimisation opportunities.
* Providing technical mentorship, supporting training materials to broaden ERP know-how across the organisation, and helping grow the Tech team through interviewing, onboarding, and contributing to best practices.


**Requirements**
* At least 6 years of hands-on ERP experience with strong NetSuite expertise across configuration, SuiteScript, workflows, and integrations — ideally in a publicly listed or compliance-heavy environment.
* A Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Finance, Business Information Technology, or a related field.
* An agentic development mindset. A genuine understanding of how AI coding assistants and agentic tools change the ERP specialist's role, with real experience reviewing and validating AI-generated outputs. You understand where agents add leverage and where human judgment is non-negotiable.
* Deep knowledge of financial processes and ERP architecture, with the analytical ability to design solutions that hold up at scale and across complex, multi-variable scenarios.
* Strong project leadership and stakeholder communication — a track record of driving initiatives from discovery to measurable business impact, and translating between business intent and technical execution without intermediaries.


**It would also be music to our ears if you have**
* NetSuite/ERP systems and their integration with Salesforce
* Invoice to pay software (e.g Medius), Spend management software (e.g Expensify), Consolidation software (e.g Aaro), Planning and Budgeting software (e.g NSPB)
* Experience with SuiteCommerce Advanced or NetSuite’s Advanced Revenue Management (ARM) module.
* NetSuite MCP Standard Tools SuiteApp
* Familiarity with modern DevOps practices (CI/CD) for NetSuite development.
* Agile methodology and how to work in agile teams.


**Equal opportunity employer**
 We believe that bringing people together from different backgrounds, experiences and perspectives makes for a healthy workplace, a more successful business and a better world. We value diversity and encourage everyone to come and soundtrack the world with us.
   

  

**Application**
 Ready to make the world
 *feel* 
 your work? Please apply, in English.

title: DevOps Software Engineer
description:
In the role, you will
 



 · Participate in daily operational work, in addition to release packaging and development activities, with monitoring and maintaining environments and applications, support and troubleshooting :
 



 Handling incidents related to service disruptions, performance issues, and system alerts.
 



 · Develop and maintain solutions and tools that will optimize deliveries and streamline processe :
 



 pipelines, windows services, integrations, XAIS
 



 · take the lead in interesting development projects
 



 · infrastructure as code, developing and maintaining solutions
 



 · Participation in customer projects
 



 · Be available to provide guidance of technical questions and share your expertise within team, with other teams, project managers, and stakeholders.
 



 Who you are
 


* We see that you are a self-driven, solution-oriented team player.
* You understand the significance of ensuring that not only our customers, but also our colleagues, have access to our payroll systems and databases that are continuously up and running.
* You are motivated by operational challenges, interested in how the system works, and are curious to find out how the system can be made more efficient.
* Not afraid to learn new tech and take lead in projects to develop new solutions
* We are looking for someone with strong communication skills as the role involves collaboration with our customers. You are used to participating in customer meetings and have experience contributing to implementation projects, to conduct professional dialogues, and understand customer needs.



 Feel safe with and/or have experience from:
 



 · Development in asp.net core C#
 



 · IIS web server (on virtual machine) and knowledge of containers is desirable
 



 · Yaml CI/CD Pipelines in Azure Devops or similar
 



 · Scripting in powershell and infrastructure as code
 



 · SQL
 



 · Experience of monitoring and alarm procedures for operation Azure app insights
 



 · Experience in instrumentation of code for Observability and Monitoring
 



 · Azure cloud
 



 · Swedish and English proficiency is a must
 



  





 Advantageous if you know
 



 · Docker
 



 · Kubernetes
 



 · Splunk
 



  





  





**What We Offer** 



* Competitive salary based on experience and achievements, plus a flexible benefits package.
* A dynamic environment with flexible working hours and remote work options.
* Continuous learning opportunities through individual development plans and professional training.
* Career growth: whether you want to deepen your expertise or broaden your knowledge, there’s always room to grow at SD Worx.



  





**From many places, we work as one—moving from better to best together.** 




 SD Worx embraces diversity in the workplace. Diversity drives inspiration and innovation in our company. We welcome applications from qualified talent regardless of origin, nationality, gender, ethnicity, religion, age, disability, sexual orientation or life stage.

title: Senior Software Developer till internationellt SaaS-bolag
description:
*Vill du arbeta i en modern tech‑stack, ta stort tekniskt ansvar och bygga skalbara backendtjänster i en global logistikplattform? Vi söker nu en Senior Software Developer i vår kunds räkning* 




  





**Om tjänsten** 




 Den här tjänsten är en direktrekrytering vilket innebär att rekryteringsprocessen sker genom Bravura och du anställs direkt hos vår kund.
 



  





**Om företaget** 




 Du blir en del av ett internationellt SaaS‑bolag med B2B‑kunder och partners runt om i Europa. Verksamheten utvecklar och förvaltar molnbaserade lösningar som används i affärskritiska flöden hos kunder med höga krav på tillgänglighet, skalbarhet och säkerhet.
 



  





 Som Senior Software Developer ingår du i ett erfaret utvecklingsteam med ansvar för vidareutveckling av bolagets skalbara molntjänst. Arbetet sker i nära samarbete med systerteam, både i Sverige och internationellt, där teamen äger hela livscykeln från utveckling till drift.
