title: IT Architect
description:
**About Justera Group**
 Justera Group AB is a leading Swedish IT consulting firm with great experience specializing in building high-performing technology teams and delivering end-to-end IT solutions. Led by dynamic female executives, Justera Group focuses on helping businesses harness the power of digital technologies to continuously evolve in today’s rapidly changing economy. The company has deep expertise in IT consultancy, software development, and recruitment services, providing clients with purpose-driven, well-trained consultants who consistently deliver efficient and effective results. Justera Group manages the entire talent lifecycle, from hiring to ongoing management, ensuring the right fit for each project on time and within budget. With their strong commitment to quality, collaboration, and client success, Justera Group is a trusted partner for technology innovation across Sweden.
   

  

**About the Role:**
 We are seeking an expert
 **IT Architect** 
 to proactively drive the vision, design, and governance of our modern enterprise IT infrastructure. In this role, you will align business strategies with cutting-edge cloud architecture, ensuring scalability, security, and agility. You will bridge the gap between complex technical engineering and high-level stakeholder strategy, guiding cross-functional teams toward a cohesive target state.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Architectural Vision & Roadmap: Analyze stakeholder requirements, map the "As-Is" application and infrastructure landscape, identify gaps, and define a clear architecture vision and strategic roadmap.
* Governance & Standards: Proactively develop, guide, and govern architectural principles, standards, and best practices to reduce complexity, lower operational costs, and improve business capabilities.
* Stakeholder Alignment & Communication: Translate complex technical concepts into clear, actionable insights for business stakeholders. Drive consensus on architectural trade-offs across all organizational levels.
* Collaboration & Relationship Building: Partner with other domain architects and cross-functional teams to improve systemic agility, mitigate risks, and resolve ongoing architectural challenges.
* Mentorship & Continuous Improvement: Keep focus on your own professional development while actively mentoring engineering and architecture teams to elevate the organization's collective technical maturity.


 Re
 **quirements:**
* Cloud Architecture: Microsoft Azure certified (Azure Solutions Architect Expert) or equivalent deep, hands-on production experience.
* Containerization & Orchestration: Proven track record designing, setting up, and managing enterprise-grade applications on Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS).
* Data & Integration: Direct experience designing and deploying enterprise databases using Azure Postgres, as well as managing high-throughput, event-driven integrations utilizing Apache Kafka.
* IT Solution Architecture: Excellent Level – Proven ability to design resilient, scalable, and secure end-to-end cloud-native systems.
* Software Engineering: Superior Level – Deep fundamental understanding of modern software development lifecycles, patterns, and clean code practices.
* Enterprise Architecture: Professional Level – Ability to view the technical ecosystem holistically and align it with broader organizational boundaries and compliance models.
* Conceptual Thinking: Superior Level – Ability to abstract complex system requirements into modular, maintainable architectural patterns.
* Business Acumen: Superior Level – Strong understanding of corporate business domains, value chains, and how technical architecture directly drives commercial outcomes.
* Strategic Advisory: Experience leading strategic discussions regarding cost efficiencies, risk reduction, and agility optimization.


**What We Offer:**
* A dynamic and innovative workplace, driving advancements in cutting-edge robotic technologies
* The opportunity to collaborate with talented cross-functional teams on meaningful and impactful projects
* Competitive compensation and a comprehensive benefits package
* A supportive culture that fosters continuous learning, growth, and professional development
* Flexible hybrid working model for an optimal work-life balance
* 25 days of annual leave to recharge and relax
* An annual wellness allowance of 3,500 SEK to support your health and wellbeing

title: Network Data Admin
description:
**Job Description for L3 Position:** 



1. Ensure availability to support Customer Site for 24\*7\*365 as team.
2. Ability to Identify IP Address schema, Subnets, Subnet Mask and perform basic IP Address management. Knowledge on various network elements, ports devices, Links and Technologies.
3. Should be able to understand Theoretical concepts in Network fundamentals like SNMP, TCP/IP, etc. Clear understanding of the Ticketing Tools
4. Network Routing (L2/L3) Able to configure and troubleshoot various LAN routing protocols and Inter VLAN Routing technologies Able to configure and troubleshoot routing protocols like RIP1, RIP2, EIGRP, OSPF, and BGP.
5. Contribute to L3 team in RCA and data inputs for co P1 incidents. Clear understanding of Metro Ethernet standards, Technology concepts, various elements used in the network and first level diagnostics. Able to configure and troubleshoot OSPF Network topology based on design input.
6. Should be able to perform IP Address management using Subneting / Supernetting, CIDR, VLSM. Create config templates and configure ports in L2 and L3 Switch elements. Able to perform LAN and WLAN network incident Diagnosis, Troubleshooting till resolution.
7. Good Knowledge on Cisco debug and Show commands on VLAN, STP, VTP, Trunking, ISL, 802.1q, etc.
8. Good Knowledge on IPsec & GRE Tunnel configuration and troubleshooting.
9. Good Knowledge on Wireless LAN Controller, Access point’s configuration and IEEE802.11 suite Able to do Load balancing configuration using HSRP, VRRP, GLBP techniques.
10. Clear understanding and configuration of L2 / L3 switching Good understanding of Cisco 2900-to-6500 series switches, Inter VLAN routing and Access List configurations, TACACS configuration, IOS Up gradation etc.
11. Perform basic port configuration in Switched L2 and L3 Network Basic understanding of debug and Show commands in VLAN, STP, VTP, PVST, Ether channel Theoretical understanding of Bridge, Hub, Switch, Structured Cabling, Access point etc.
12. Experience in one (or more) scripting languages: Python, Perl, Unix Shell, Windows Shell
13. Clear understanding of Ticketing Tools, able to create new tickets, modify/update tickets, Assign tickets to various queues.
14. Clear understanding of Monitoring and Management tools.
15. 8+ years of experience
16. Preferable team leading role
17. Industry standard certifications
18. ITIL certified



  





 End to End IT Operations in Managed Services
 



 24/7 Rotating Shift

title: Solutions Engineer
description:
Discover Trend AI
 



 Trend AI is a global leader in cybersecurity, helping organizations secure and protect the exchange of digital information. Backed by decades of security expertise, advanced threat intelligence, and continuous innovation, Trend AI protects hundreds of thousands of organizations and millions of individuals across cloud environments, networks, devices, and endpoints.
 



 Our AI-powered cybersecurity platform delivers advanced threat detection, prevention, and centralized visibility across hybrid and multi-cloud environments including AWS, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud. With more than 7,000 employees across 65 countries, Trend AI enables organizations to confidently navigate an increasingly connected world.
 



 Discover You
 



 At Trend AI, we hire for potential, capability, and mindset. You will collaborate with some of the most experienced professionals in cybersecurity while working closely with leadership and customers across the globe. We encourage ownership, continuous learning, and innovation, giving you the opportunity to shape both your career and the future of cybersecurity.
 



 Discover your next exciting career opportunity.
 



  





 Solutions Engineer
 



**Location:** 
 Stockholm, Sweden
 



  





 Overview
 



 The Solutions Engineer acts as the technical advisor and trusted partner to customers, supporting the sales organization with deep cybersecurity expertise and solution-driven consulting. In this role, you will work closely with customers, partners, and internal teams to design and position Trend AI’s cybersecurity solutions across modern IT and cloud environments.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 



  




* Act as the technical lead during the pre-sales process, helping customers solve complex cybersecurity challenges
* Deliver technical presentations, workshops, and live demonstrations of Trend AI solutions
* Lead and support Proof of Concept (PoC) engagements
* Design and position cloud security architectures across AWS, Azure, and GCP
* Build strong technical relationships with customers, partners, and internal stakeholders
* Collaborate closely with Sales, Channel, and Partner teams to drive business success
* Share technical best practices internally and contribute to enablement initiatives
* Support regional customer engagements and industry events (~30–35% travel)



  





 Qualifications
 



  




* 3+ years of experience as a Solutions Engineer, Sales Engineer, Security Engineer, or similar technical customer-facing role
* Experience with cybersecurity technologies such as endpoint security, firewalls, IDS/IPS, XDR, or threat detection solutions
* Strong understanding of cloud platforms including AWS, Azure, or GCP
* Excellent communication and presentation skills with both technical and business stakeholders
* Scripting or automation experience with Python, PowerShell, or Bash is considered a plus
* Industry certifications such as CISSP, CEH, Security+, or cloud certifications are advantageous



  





 At Trend AI, we value innovation, collaboration, and diversity. Join a global team dedicated to protecting organizations and enabling a safer digital future.

title: Senior Data Engineer - Tech
description:
**Job Description**

**​​WHAT YOU’LL DO​**
  

 As a Senior Data Engineer, you will shape scalable, reliable, and forward thinking data solutions that empower our product teams and unlock meaningful impact across H&M. You will design and evolve data infrastructure, lead complex technical initiatives, and help create an environment where data enables confident, informed decisions. You’ll also play a key role in nurturing a culture of learning and curiosity by guiding others and championing modern engineering practices.​
   

  




* Build and optimize scalable data pipelines and core data infrastructure.


* Develop robust solutions using SQL and modern languages like Python or Java.


* Turn complex business needs into clear, datadriven solutions.


* Improve data systems by identifying and delivering smart optimizations.


* Mentor and support other engineers to strengthen the team’s capabilities.



  

  





**WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH​**




 You will be part of a collaborative data community within our Tech organisation and work closely with Data Engineers across multiple teams and products. You will partner with cross‑functional roles such as product managers, program managers, architects and platform teams, and you will collaborate with data science and machine learning colleagues when needed. Depending on the assignment, you may also work with business stakeholders, analysts, governance teams and security specialists and in areas like commercial, marketing, product, supply chain etc.
   

  





 ​
   

  





**WHO YOU ARE​**




*We are looking for people with…​*



* ​Experience or a degree in a technical field such as BSc, BE, or similar.


* Years of experience in data engineering, with strong skills in SQL, Python, or similar languages.


* Strong skills in data modeling, warehousing, and pipeline development


* Experience with modern engineering practices and Agile ways of working


* A good understanding of business needs within a productfocused environment.


* Experience working with areas like Supply Chain, Sales, Logistics, Marketing or Retail is considered beneficial



*And people who are…​*



* Clear communicators who enjoy solving problems together.


* Skilled at building trust with stakeholders and keeping everyone aligned.


* Curious about cloud technologies and eager to choose tools that help the team work smarter.


* Motivated by creating solutions that bring meaningful value to people and the organisation.



 ​
   

  





**WHO WE ARE​**




 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.​
   

  





 We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future. ​
   

  





 ​
   

  





**WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE ​**
  

 At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer our employees attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. ​
   

  




* We offer all our employee’s attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. All our employees receive a 25% staff discount usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP. You can read more about our H&M Incentive Program here.


* ​30 days holiday


* We offer a collective agreement which includes pension and life insurance


* H&M Incentive Program


* Wellness benefit 4000kr/year  (from Jan 1, 2026)


* Benify Benefits Portal


* Community with activities



  

  





**JOIN US​**




 Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things – our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it’s our people who make us who we are.​
   

  





 Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.​
   

  





 \*We are committed to a recruitment process that is fair, equitable, and based on competency. We therefore kindly ask you to not attach a cover letter in your application.​
   

  





 ​We are currently hiring for 4 headcounts.

title: Installationstekniker till Nordiskt Företag
description:
**Om företaget** 




 Vi på Asta Agency samarbetar med ett väletablerat nordiskt företag som utvecklar smarta lösningar för detaljhandel och serviceverksamheter. Verksamheten är marknadsledande inom e-handelslogistik för dagligvaruhandeln i Sverige och Norden och har genom åren utvecklat starka partnerskap med både kunder och leverantörer.
 



  





 Med en stark marknadsposition och lång erfarenhet av att leverera verksamhetskritiska lösningar till några av Nordens största aktörer erbjuder företaget en dynamisk miljö där teknik, service och kundnytta står i centrum. Verksamheten präglas av långsiktiga kundrelationer, hög kompetens och ett tydligt fokus på framtidens handel. Dem erbjuder även omfattande service och support kopplat till sina lösningar.
 



  





**Om tjänsten** 




 Som installationstekniker får du en viktig roll i flera pågående projekt där tekniska lösningar ska uppgraderas och implementeras ute hos kunder. Arbetet sker till stor del självständigt och innebär att du åker ut till butiker och kundmiljöer för att genomföra uppdrag enligt tydliga instruktioner och manualer.
 



  





 Projekten omfattar bland annat uppgradering av vågar och packmaskiner, arbete med varuautomater samt lösningar kopplade till click and collect. Rollen innebär mycket tid på vägarna och kundkontakt både via telefon och på plats. Du får introduktion och upplärning innan du arbetar självständigt, och det finns stöd från tekniker, support och ansvariga chefer vid behov. Samtidigt passar rollen dig som snabbt kan sätta dig in i instruktioner, arbeta metodiskt och ta ansvar för att driva arbetet framåt hos kund.
 



  





 Arbetsuppgifter:
 


* Programvaruuppgraderingar av teknisk utrustning.
* Installation och driftsättning av kundens lösningar.
* Fysisk konfigurering och anpassning av automater och teknisk utrustning.
* Ombyggnad och anpassning av befintliga lösningar.



  





**Kvalifikationer och egenskaper** 




 Vi söker dig som trivs i en självständig serviceroll där teknik, problemlösning och kundkontakt är centrala delar av vardagen. Du tar ansvar för dina arbetsuppgifter, driver ditt arbete framåt och säkerställer att det du påbörjar också blir slutfört. För att lyckas i rollen är du strukturerad, kommunikativ och flexibel. Du är lyhörd i mötet med kunder, har lätt för att skapa goda relationer och motiveras av att ge service av hög kvalitet.
 



  





 Därtill har du:
 


* En utbildning eller erfarenhet inom informations- och kommunikationsteknik, automation, nätverk eller tekniskt område.
* Erfarenhet av installation, uppgradering eller konfigurering av teknisk utrustning.
* Praktisk erfarenhet från fältarbete eller projektleveranser.
* Körkort B och egen bil.
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och/eller engelska.



  





 Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av tekniska lösningar som kombinerar programvara och mekaniska komponenter.
 



  





**Övrig information** 



* Start: Omgående.
* Plats: Stockholm eller Göteborg med omnejd.
* Omfattning: Heltid.
* Lön: Enligt överenskommelse.



  





 Vi tillämpar löpande urval i denna process vilket innebär att tjänsten kan tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag. Vi rekommenderar dig därför att ansöka så snart som möjligt!
 



 Har du frågor eller funderingar kring Asta Agencys rekryteringsprocess, tveka inte att höra av dig till alice@astaagency.se.
 



  





 Om Asta Agency
 



 Asta Agency är ett rekryterings- och bemanningsföretag som hjälper företag att hitta rätt tjänstemän i hela Sverige med fokus på Stockholm, Göteborg och Malmö. Vi rekryterar och hyr ut specialister och generalister inom försäljning, marknad, HR, kundservice, ekonomi, administration, IT och tech. Med fokus på kvalitet, långsiktighet och smarta lösningar stöttar vi både företag och kandidater i nästa steg.
 



 Läs mer om hur vi arbetar med rekrytering, bemanning och hyrrekrytering på astaagency.se.

title: Systemförvaltare
description:
Vill du arbeta nära verksamheten och bidra till stabilitet i system som behöver fungera varje dag? Här använder du din erfarenhet av systemförvaltning, support och incidenthantering för att skapa struktur, lösa problem och driva förbättringar. Du arbetar nära våra användare, kunder och leverantörer för att förstå vad som behöver fungera i det dagliga arbetet. Med struktur, tydlig dialog och ett lösningsorienterat arbetssätt ser du till att ärenden kommer framåt, att rätt personer kopplas in och att vi tillsammans skapar stabila arbetssätt som håller över tid.
   

  

 Systemförvaltare på Advania 🚀
   

  

 I rollen som Systemförvaltare hos oss arbetar du med daglig drift och förvaltning av verksamhetskritiska system. Du skapar struktur i ärendeflöden, koordinerar insatser mellan verksamhet, användare och leverantör samt driver förbättringar som bidrar till stabilitet och kvalitet över tid.
   

  

**Det innebär att du arbetar med att:**
* Hantera och följa upp ärenden inom 2nd och 3rd line
* Säkerställa stabil drift genom felsökning, problemlösning och koordinering av rätt insatser
* Prioritera, följa upp och dokumentera det löpande förvaltningsarbetet
* Skapa tydlighet kring läge, ansvar och nästa steg för verksamhet och leverantör
* Leda operativa förvaltningsmöten och leverantörsdialoger
* Identifiera återkommande problem och driva förbättringar som minskar antalet incidenter över tid
* Koordinera aktiviteter kopplade till demand och release
* Säkerställa att förändringar är förankrade och tydligt kommunicerade till berörda parter


 I den här rollen blir ett rådgivande och förtroendeskapande arbetssätt en viktig del av vardagen. Du bygger långsiktiga relationer med kund, verksamhet och leverantör genom att sätta dig in i behov, driva dialogen framåt och omsätta insikter till tydliga rekommendationer, prioriteringar och lösningar. Med helhetsansvar för leverans, kvalitet och värdeskapande följer du upp arbetet, kommunicerar nästa steg och säkerställer att rätt insatser genomförs för att skapa verklig effekt
   

  

 Vad vi söker hos dig ✨
   

  

 För att du ska trivas och passa hos oss söker vi dig som har en bakgrund inom systemförvaltning eller applikationsförvaltning samt erfarenhet av support och incidenthantering. Du arbetar idag troligen som applikationsförvaltare, systemförvaltare, systemspecialist eller i en senior supportroll.
   

  

 Som person motiveras du av att skapa struktur, lösa problem och få samarbeten att fungera. Du trivs i en roll nära verksamheten där du följer upp ärenden, prioriterar mellan behov och kommunicerar tydligt med flera olika intressenter.
   

  

**Vi söker dig som har**
* Bakgrund inom systemförvaltning eller applikationsförvaltning
* Vana av support och incidenthantering
* Kunskap om arbete i verksamhetskritiska system
* Förmåga att koordinera arbete mellan flera intressenter
* God struktur och trygghet i att prioritera mellan olika behov
* Analytisk förmåga och lätt för att identifiera mönster i återkommande problem
* Tydlig kommunikation i dialog med verksamhet, användare, kund och leverantör


**Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av:**
* Ärendehanteringssystem
* Orderflöden, leveransflöden och integrationsflöden
* Releasehantering och förändringshantering
* Leverantörsdialoger
* Test eller testkoordinering
* ITIL, PM3 eller liknande ramverk


 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan! 👋
   

  

 Visa gärna ditt intresse så snart som möjligt då vi intervjuar löpande. Vi välkomnar sökanden med olika bakgrunder, erfarenheter och synsätt, eftersom vi vet att en bredare mångfald berikar var och en av oss och stärker såväl effektivitet som kreativitet i vårt arbete.
   

  

 Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess genomgår våra slutkandidater en obligatorisk bakgrundskontroll, en för oss kvalitativ kontroll inför ett anställningsbeslut. Advania samarbetar med Ljung & Sjöberg i ärenden kopplat till alkohol-, drog- och spelproblematik och är en certifierad "Proaktiv Arbetsplats".
   

  

 Tveka inte att höra av dig om du har några frågor eller funderingar.
   

  

 Det är du som arbetar nära kunden som vet vad dem behöver och vad som blir den bästa lösningen för just deras unika behov, både i dag och i morgon. Därför tycker vi att det är du som ska fatta besluten. Det är genom att erbjuda säkra, hållbara och kundanpassade lösningar som vi skapar värde för kunderna och samhället i stort.
   

  

 Vi bryr oss om hur våra medarbetare mår – på riktigt. Därför samarbetar Advania med Ljung & Sjöberg för att skapa en trygg, proaktiv arbetsmiljö med stöd kring alkohol-, drog- och beroenderelaterade frågor. Tillsammans bygger vi en hållbar arbetsplats där det är okej att be om hjälp, och där förebyggande arbete gör skillnad – för individen, teamet och företaget.
   

  

 I en miljö präglad av stort kundfokus och frihet under ansvar blir det extra viktigt för oss att bygga starka team bestående av ödmjuka stjärnor. Att arbeta i en inkluderande miljö, med kollegor och kunder som vill utvecklas, ger oss möjligheten att trivas och ha riktigt roligt på jobbet. Vi tror på en platt organisation med agilt arbetssätt och flexibilitet. Detta är det enda sättet för en hållbar framtid.
   

  

 Advania Sverige, ”The tech company with people at heart”, har kontor över hela landet, från Luleå i norr till Malmö i syd. Dagligen hjälper våra 1 700 specialister våra kunder, både inom privat och offentlig sektor, i deras ambitioner och mål att digitalisera sina verksamheter. Genom långsiktiga relationer, ledande teknologier, moderna plattformslösningar och strategiska partnerskap formar vi framtidens IT-landskap. Vårt syfte sträcker sig bortom teknik: att ge människor kraften att skapa hållbara värden.
   

  

 Advaniagruppen levererar tjänster till kunder i Sverige, Norge, Storbritannien, Island, Finland och Danmark inom hållbar och säker digitalisering.

title: Support Engineer - Voice
description:
**Are you the kind of engineer who thrives on the puzzle of a live production issue, digging past the surface symptoms to expose the true root cause?** 




  





 At boost.ai, we are currently scaling up our Voice team. 2026 is the year of Voice!
 



  





 With a steady 15-20% YoY growth rate at boost.ai, we are the go-to Conversational AI provider for regulated sectors such as finance, the public sector, insurance, and telecom, and we are expanding into many more industries, including healthcare.
 



  





 We are not just another "wrapper" that popped up overnight.
 



  





 We are a bona fide AI and Data Science company that has been pioneering machine learning since 2016.
 



  





 Today, we are building a voice-first platform where millions of conversations will run through, and more than 600 of our virtual agents are live across EMEA and North America. Enterprises like Tryg, DNB, Telenor, and Nordea trust us with their customers.
 



  





**By joining us, you are stepping into the core of a central, rapidly growing player in the global AI space.** 




  





 You won't be building theoretical demos or waiting on roadmap slides.
 



  





 You would be joining early enough to genuinely shape it, and established enough that real customers are already depending on what you ship.
 



  





 Our team is diverse, dedicated, and a little bit obsessed with getting voice right, and we work hard to make sure everyone here can do the best work of their career.
 



  





 You will be on the bleeding edge, solving some of the hardest engineering challenges in low-latency computing and genuinely shaping a product that ships directly to massive global enterprises.
 



  





**The Challenge: Technical First Responder** 




 Real-time voice on enterprise networks is some of the most challenging and satisfying debugging work in software.
 



  





 When it comes to voice, there is zero forgiveness for latency or dropped packets.
 



  





 As a Voice Support Engineer, you are right at the intersection of production debugging, networking, and real-time voice.
 



  





 When something misbehaves on a live deployment, whether it’s call quality, SIP signaling, or integration failures, you are the person who figures out
 *why* 
 .
 



  





**You will be 3rd line support, so it won't just be closing tickets, you will own the puzzle end-to-end. Build small tools and automations in Python to ensure we never have to debug the same issue twice.** 




  





**Where you can work:** 




**This role is hybrid and based in one of our European offices:** 
 Copenhagen, Oslo, Stavanger, Stockholm, Helsinki, or London.
 



  





***Note:***
*Eligibility to live and work in the Nordics or the UK is required. We are not able to support relocation from outside this region or fully remote arrangements for this position* 




  





**What you will be doing** 




 You will be the technical owner for voice-related customer incidents, partnering closely with our Voice and Core Platform engineering teams.
 



  





**This is a role with a clear path to deep technical expertise, you will get direct visibility into the engineering teams building the platform you support.** 



* **Be the Root Cause Detective:** 
 Investigate complex production issues across SIP signaling, media flow, networking, and the boost.ai platform. You document and engineer solutions so it doesn't happen again.



  




* **Get Customers Live:** 
 Support enterprises through voice integration onboarding, testing, and go-live, including connectivity verification, configuration reviews, and load testing.



  




* **Bring Strong Networking Instincts:** 
 Apply your fundamentals (TCP/IP, UDP, NAT, firewalls, routing) to diagnose connectivity issues across messy, highly complex enterprise IT environments.



  




* **Engineer Better Support:** 
 Build small tools, scripts, and automations (Python) that improve diagnostics, monitoring, and runbooks. You will turn customer pain into clear signals for platform improvements.



  




* **Communicate Clearly:** 
 Translate gnarly, highly technical network issues to non-technical customers without losing them.



  





**What to expect from the day-to-day setup:** 



* **No On-Call:** 
 When you are off the clock, you are actually off. There is no on-call requirement for this role.



  




* **Local Business Hours:** 
 We work across multiple time zones, but your work happens during your local hours. We offer a high degree of flexibility so you can manage your schedule as agreed upon with your manager.



  




* **Focused Work:** 
 Customer-facing meetings are infrequent, allowing you to focus deeply on your core tasks.



  




* **Team Connection:** 
 While the day-to-day is highly flexible, you can expect occasional travel for large company-wide or departmental gatherings to celebrate wins and align on strategy.



  





**What we expect from you** 




 You may come from technical support, platform engineering, network engineering, VoIP/telephony, SRE, or customer-facing production engineering.
 



  





***Note***
*: You do not need to be a SIP expert today. You just need to be the kind of engineer who wants to become one. Deep knowledge of SIP, WebRTC, and telephony can be built here.* 




  





**Requirements (The Non-Negotiables):** 



* Hands-on understanding of TCP/IP, UDP, NAT, firewalls, and routing in cloud and enterprise environments.



  




* Proven experience supporting complex production systems with a real customer-facing component.



  




* Comfortable writing Python to automate diagnostics, build small tools, and contribute scripts to the platform.



  




* Excellent ability to manage customer escalations calmly and professionally.



  




* A degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent practical experience.



  




* Fluent in English



  





**Blow us away (Nice-to-haves):** 



* **SIP & Voice Protocols:** 
 Hands-on SIP or WebRTC experience is a massive advantage.
* **CCaaS & Telephony:** 
 Experience with CCaaS platforms, contact-center integrations, or telephony providers.
* **An Automation Mindset:** 
 We are investing heavily in agentic engineering and automation across support. Familiarity is a bonus; curiosity is essential.
* **Observability:** 
 Comfort with logs, metrics, and tracing. You know your way around a production incident and can navigate observability tooling under pressure.



  





**The Team & Perks** 




 We work hard on tough challenges, but
 **fun is one of our actual core values.** 
 We are an opinionated, high-trust team that celebrates wins together (our annual Boost Camp every October is a massive highlight!).
 



  





 You will have the room to be independent, opinionated, and innovative. To back you up, we offer a comprehensive range of employee benefits designed to support your overall well-being and allow you to do the absolute best work of your career.
 



  





**Ready to solve the hardest puzzles in Voice AI?** 




 We would love to hear from you. If you have any questions about the role or the tech stack before applying, feel free to reach out to our recruitment partner,
 **Casper Skyum Høgh** 
 , at
 **csh@ing.dk** 
 , who is leading the search for this position.

title: Data Scientist
description:
Born autonomous. Born electric.
   

  

 Since 2016, our technology has connected global communities with the things they need – and all without the emissions. We’re made up of experts in multiple fields and that’s how we’ve developed a new way to move goods. This is technology purpose-built for the industry. This is safer, cleaner, and more reliable movement.
   

  

 We are Einride and this is how we build a better future.
   

  

 Want to be part of transforming road freight – for good? Einride is showing the world a new way to move, based on the latest digital, electric and autonomous technologies. Through freight capacity as a service, we enable businesses around the world to accelerate towards their sustainability goals.
   

  

 Founded in 2016, Einride became the first company in the world to deploy a cab-less autonomous electric vehicle on a public road (Sweden, 2019). In 2022, we were the first to successfully operate such a vehicle on a US public road. Today our award-winning technology has been launched across 8 countries (and counting). Our clients are some of the world’s biggest shippers, including Fortune 500 companies. We are also operating Sweden’s largest truck dedicated public charging network and counting.
   

  

 As a Data Scientist on the Solution EMEA team at Einride, you will be both a builder and an analyst. You will play a key role in designing the analytical infrastructure that powers the team – automating manual workflows using AI as a native capability, creating internal tools that scale our work, and supporting data pipelines where needed. At the same time, a meaningful portion of your time will be spent hands-on on customer engagements — analysing freight networks, sizing electrification opportunities, and designing solutions that land in front of logistics directors and fleet managers.
   

  

 This is a role for someone who is as comfortable in a business case spreadsheet as they are designing an agentic pipeline.
   

  

 You will
   

  

* Identify and automate manual analytical workflows using AI as a native capability – turning repetitive, time-consuming processes into scalable internal solutions
* Design and maintain data pipelines to ingest, clean, and structure large-scale transport and logistics datasets, primarily using SQL and Python
* Build and maintain internal dashboards and automated reporting and analysis tools
* Generate insights from complex transport data (fleet performance, route optimisation, energy consumption, freight lane analysis) and translate them into clear, actionable outputs
* Collaborate closely with Business Analysts, Solution colleagues, and broader stakeholders to solve data-oriented challenges and build solutions supporting our customer engagements.
* Collaborate closely with Business Analysts, Solution colleagues, and broader stakeholders to solve data-oriented challenges and build solutions supporting our customer engagements.
* Stay current with advances in AI and analytics tooling – and actively integrate new approaches into the team’s ways of working


**We Expect You To**
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Data Science, Statistics, Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or similar
* Minimum 2+ years’ experience after graduation in a data science, analytics engineering, or quantitative analytics role
* Proficiency in Python (pandas, NumPy, etc.) and SQL are core requirements – you are comfortable wrangling large, messy datasets
* Comfortable applying GenAI tools (Claude, Gemini, etc.) as native building blocks for automating analytical workflows and constructing internal tools
* Hands-on experience with cloud data platforms such as BigQuery, Snowflake, or similar
* Proficiency in data visualisation tools – Looker Studio in particular – and a strong instinct for turning data into clear, compelling visual stories
* Strong analytical mindset with the ability to translate complex data into clear insights that drive decisions
* Comfortable working in a commercial context: able to read a business situation, frame analysis around what a customer or stakeholder actually needs, and communicate findings without hiding behind the data
* Self-starter and team player: you take ownership of problems, work well with ambiguous real-world data, and communicate technical findings clearly to non-technical stakeholders
* Interest in transport, logistics, e-mobility, and sustainability – curiosity about the domain is a genuine advantage


 This is a full-time position based in Stockholm or Gothenburg. You will be part of a truly diverse, high performing team with a common passion for sustainability and making things happen in an innovative way. We recommend that you submit your application as soon as possible since selection and interviews are held continually.
   

  

 At Einride, we are innovators, building solutions the world has never seen before – but urgently needs. That’s why we take action, and it’s why we are always eager to be challenged. We know that our best innovations come from having a diverse mix of people, including those of different experiences, career paths, and walks of life. By coming together and sharing our perspectives openly – by disagreeing, discussing, and committing – we deliver greater impact.

title: Enterprise Architect
description:
****Enterprise Architect – Videberg Kraft AB****
 Being part of the development of new nuclear power in Sweden is a unique opportunity – and a central part of the future sustainable energy supply.
   

  

 Videberg Kraft is currently building a new nuclear power company from the ground up, where digital and technical capabilities are established in parallel with the business. As a project company, Videberg Kraft has the mission to develop, construct, and operate Sweden’s future nuclear power.
   

  

 We are therefore looking for an
 **Enterprise Architect** 
 who wants to take on a key role in shaping and governing the company’s target architecture and ensuring that the IT and information landscape supports the business, regulatory requirements, and long-term sustainability.
   

  

****Your role****
 As Enterprise Architect, you are responsible for establishing, developing, and maintaining Videberg Kraft’s overall IT and business architecture. You ensure a holistic perspective, traceability, and alignment across business, technology, security, and regulatory requirements.
   

  

 You work closely with the CIO, CSO/CISO, business owners, and external partners to create an architecture that is robust, secure, and enables future scalability.
   

  

****Architecture & Target State****
* Establish and maintain the company’s target architecture (enterprise architecture)
* Ensure clear separation between IT, OT, and information domains where required
* Define architecture principles, standards, and guidelines
* Ensure that solutions support the full business lifecycle (engineering, establishment, operations)


****Technology Choices & Platform Governance****
* Provide guidance on technology choices, platforms, and integration patterns
* Ensure consistency and reuse across the system landscape
* Support procurement activities and supplier dialogues from an architectural perspective
* Contribute to decision-making related to cloud, SaaS, and hybrid solutions in a regulated environment


****Regulatory Support & Collaboration****
* Ensure that the architecture enables compliance with regulatory requirements (e.g. NIS2, GDPR, protective security legislation)
* Work closely with information security and security architecture (CSO/CISO)
* Document and visualize the architecture for both internal and external stakeholders


****We are looking for someone who****
* Has extensive experience as an Enterprise Architect or in a similar architectural role
* Is used to working in complex environments, preferably regulated or societally critical
* Has a strong understanding of both business and technology
* Is skilled at creating structure, principles, and target architectures in environments where much is being established
* Communicates fluently in both Swedish and English


****We offer****
* The opportunity to establish enterprise architecture within a completely new nuclear power company
* A strategically important role with significant influence over the future system landscape
* Close collaboration with executive management, the security function, and business
* A central position in one of Sweden’s most significant industrial initiatives


 If you have questions about the role, you are very welcome to contact:
   

  

**fredrik.hallberg@videbergkraft.se**
 We’re reviewing applications continuously, so we encourage you to apply as soon as possible.
 **The application deadline is July 9th, 2026.**
 We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Teknisk projektledare till försvarsrelaterad verksamhet
description:
*Vill du ta ditt konsultande till nästa nivå hos Sveriges bästa arbetsgivare? Vi vet vad du tänker. Du har hört det förut. Men tro oss, det har du inte. Vårt körsbär på konsulttårtan är något annat. Sök jobbet och smaka själv!*
**Teknisk projektledare till försvarsrelaterad verksamhet**
 Vi söker nu flera erfarna tekniska projektledare till ett spännande och långsiktigt uppdrag inom försvarsrelaterad verksamhet. Rollen passar dig som trivs i gränslandet mellan teknik, krav, systemlösningar och projektledning – och som vill bidra i komplexa projekt med hög samhällsnytta.
   

  

 Uppdraget innebär att du får en central roll i tekniskt avancerade projekt där du ansvarar för att bryta ned komplexa tekniska helheter i hanterbara delar, driva kravarbete och säkerställa att lösningar fungerar som en sammanhållen helhet. Du kommer att arbeta nära både kundnära intressenter och interna utvecklingsteam.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som teknisk projektledare ansvarar du för den tekniska framdriften i projektet och fungerar som en viktig kontaktyta i tekniska frågor. Rollen har även inslag som påminner om lösningsarkitekt, där du förväntas kunna förstå, utvärdera och kommunicera tekniska lösningar på ett tydligt sätt.
   

  

 Exempel på arbetsuppgifter:
   

  

* Ansvara för teknisk systemlösning och leverans
* Leda arbete kopplat till systemdesign och tekniska vägval
* Driva och strukturera kravanalys
* Säkerställa att funktionella och tekniska krav uppfylls
* Identifiera tekniska risker, flaskhalsar och beroenden
* Medverka i planering av release och systemplattform
* Agera teknisk kontaktyta mot kund och projektorganisation
* Förklara komplexa tekniska samband för både tekniska och icke-tekniska intressenter
* Vid behov stötta som biträdande projektledare


**Vi söker dig som har**
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av systems engineering och kravhantering
* Erfarenhet av teknisk projektledning i komplexa miljöer
* God förmåga att definiera, analysera och utvärdera tekniska krav och lösningar
* Erfarenhet av tvärfunktionellt samarbete med utvecklingsteam, projektledning och kundnära intressenter
* God dokumentationsvana och erfarenhet av Microsoft Office-verktyg
* Flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift
* Svenskt medborgarskap, då uppdraget omfattas av säkerhetsklassning


**Det är starkt meriterande om du har erfarenhet från försvarsrelaterade projekt, informationssystem, arbete mot myndighetsnära kunder eller processer kopplade till exempelvis ISD och kravhantering enligt KSF.**
 Det här är ett uppdrag för dig som vill ta en ledande teknisk roll i en verksamhet där kvalitet, säkerhet och struktur är avgörande – och där din erfarenhet verkligen gör skillnad.
   

  

**Bara det bästa åt de bästa – vår personalfilosofi**
 Castra är en konsultgrupp inom IT och Management. Eller ja, en elite squad kan man säga. Vi samlar de vassaste och mest erfarna konsulterna, helt enkelt för att det är hos oss de får ut max i både kapacitet och livskvalitet. Vi är verksamma inom Systemutveckling, IT-infrastruktur, IT-styrning & Ledarskap samt IT-säkerhet.
   

  

 Vi är utsedda till Sveriges- och Europas bästa arbetsplats, på riktigt! Det låter lite skrytsamt, men det är faktiskt inte vi som sagt det. Castra har sedan 2017 blivit certifierad av
 **Great Place to Work,** 
 en utmärkelse som är helt baserat på medarbetarundersökningar. Vi har de senaste tre åren blivit utnämnda till
 **Sveriges Bästa Arbetsplats** 
 för stora bolag och nu senast kammade vi även hem förstaplatsen bland
 **Europas Bästa Arbetsplatser** 
 . Som grädde på moset är vi även ett Gasell- och Karriärföretag!
   

  

 På Castra tror vi på frihet, utveckling och gemenskap. Du som konsult styr själv vilka uppdrag du tar, när du jobbar, om du vill levla upp någon kompetens och hur och mycket lön och semester du tar ut. Att du får bygga din egen logga är bara en bonus! Trodde du det var allt? Då trodde du fel. Stöd av bra chefer, aktiviteter, kompetent och snabbfotad säljstyrka, möjlighet till delägarskap, stora möjligheter att påverka bolagets framtid och härliga kollegor – listan på vad som gör Castra till en fantastisk arbetsplats kan göras lååång. Möjligheterna bra nära oändliga. Win för alla parter, säger vi.
   

  

*Castra har kontor i Göteborg, Stockholm, Malmö, Linköping, Norrköping, Örebro, Jönköping och Sundsvall.*
 Läs mer om hur det är att jobba hos oss på castra.se/konsulterbjudande/
   

  

**Har vi lyckats väcka din nyfikenhet?**
 Sök direkt via länken eller hör av dig till Charlotta på Charlotta.Ljung@castra.se

title: IoT Implementation & Test Engineer
description:
Summary
 



  





 Are you passionate about turning customer requirements into real-world IoT solutions? Do you enjoy working directly with customers, integrating devices and APIs, troubleshooting complex technical challenges, and ensuring solutions perform flawlessly before deployment?
 



  





 KDDI Spherience is looking for a hands-on
 **IoT Implementation & Testing Engineer** 
 to bridge the gap between customer needs and technical execution. In this customer-facing role, you will work closely with enterprise customers, connectivity providers, platform vendors, and internal product teams to implement, test, validate, and operationalize IoT solutions across a wide range of devices, networks, and applications.
 



  





 You will play a key role in understanding customer use cases, configuring and integrating IoT devices and platforms, supporting API integrations, executing end-to-end testing, and analyzing logs and system data to identify issues and trends. Working collaboratively with Product, Support, and Operations teams, you will drive issue resolution, improve solution quality, and ensure successful handover into production.
 



  





 This role is ideal for a technically strong engineer who enjoys solving complex problems, working across multiple technologies and stakeholders, and taking ownership of delivering reliable, scalable IoT solutions that create real business value for customers.
 



  





 About KDDI
 



  





 We are a global Top 10 telecommunications pioneer and a Global Fortune 500 company providing our international customer base with data centers, networks, content delivery, system integration, and more. We connect vehicles from several of the world's largest Automotive OEMs, as well as mobility and IoT programs across the globe. Our industry-leading
 **Telehouse** 
 data center provides colocation at over 40 sites in 23 cities across 12 countries, including London, New York, Frankfurt, and Shanghai. Leveraging our strengths as a telecom provider, we combine
 **IT and network expertise** 
 to deliver secure, scalable, and stress-free connectivity for our customers.
 



  





 Responsibilities
 


* Engage directly with
 **customers to understand business use cases and technical requirements**
* Translate requirements into
 **practical IoT solution designs and implementation plans**
* Perform
 **end-to-end implementation** 
 , including:
* Customer onboarding and configuration
* Connectivity setup (cellular IoT, SIM/eSIM provisioning)
* Platform and API integrations
* Support and implement
 **API integrations** 
 (REST, MQTT, HTTP) between devices, platforms, and customer systems
* Design and execute
 **testing activities** 
 , including:
* System Integration Testing (SIT)
* User Acceptance Testing (UAT)
* API and performance testing
* Validate
 **data flow from devices to cloud/platform systems** 
 to ensure reliability and performance
* **Analyze logs, metrics, and system traces** 
 to:
* Identify root causes of issues
* Detect patterns and recurring problems
* Proactively highlight performance or reliability risks
* Collaborate with
 **Support and Product teams** 
 to:
* Drive issue resolution
* Improve product stability and performance
* Provide feedback for continuous improvement
* Troubleshoot across
 **device, network, and application layers**
* Work with
 **MNOs, platform providers, and internal teams** 
 for integration and issue resolution
* Ensure solutions meet
 **technical, functional, and SLA requirements before handover**
* Prepare
 **comprehensive technical documentation** 
 , including:
* Solution design and configurations
* API integration details
* Test cases, logs, and validation results
* Operational handover documentation
* Support smooth
 **transition to Operations** 
 , ensuring full knowledge transfer



  





 Knowledge and Skills
 



 Technical Skills
 


* Strong hands-on experience with:
* **API integration and testing** 
 (REST APIs, Postman, Swagger/OpenAPI)
* **IoT protocols** 
 (MQTT, HTTP/HTTPS, CoAP)
* Experience in
 **log analysis and troubleshooting** 
 , using tools such as:
* Application/system logs
* Network traces
* Monitoring and observability platforms
* Solid understanding of
 **IoT ecosystems** 
 , including:
* Cellular IoT (NB-IoT, LTE-M, 4G/5G)
* SIM/eSIM lifecycle and provisioning
* Rating Billing knowledge (Added Advantage)
* Sensors, gateways, and edge devices (Optional)
* Experience working with
 **different types of IoT devices and modules**
* Familiarity with
 **cloud platforms** 
 (AWS, Azure etc)
* Knowledge of
 **networking fundamentals** 
 (TCP/IP, DNS, VPNs)
* Experience with
 **testing methodologies** 
 (SIT, UAT, automation is a plus)
* Scripting skills (Python/JavaScript) for
 **debugging or test automation** 
 are a plus



  





 Soft Skills
 


* Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English is mandatory.
* Comfortable working across
 **global teams (Japan, Europe, USA)**



  





 Requirements
 


* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or related field
* 4–8 years of experience in
 **IoT implementation, system integration, or testing roles**
* Experience in
 **customer-facing technical roles** 
 is highly preferred
* Experience working in
 **multi-vendor and multi-MNO environments** 
 is a plus

title: Head of Tech Sweden, Group Payments & Accounts
description:
Are you passionate about leadership and delivering first class Payment & Accounts products that are critical for our customers and society at large?
   

  

 Your responsibilities:
   

  

* Be an experienced leader with the overall accountability and responsibility for the Tech unit within Group Payments & Accounts Sweden, responsible for building a new IT infrastructure and products to support our customers.
* Be instrumental in leading and driving the Tech unit’s execution of the current transformation plan, as well as the strategy going forward.
* Be a leader of leaders who builds trust, inspires people, and shows courage.
* Promote and nurture a strong collaboration culture across the different units within the bank to accelerate our business goals and joint commitment.
* Aligning your work and the unit’s contribution to the bank’s strategic direction.
* Define the target state and roadmap together with stakeholders across the bank, ensuring a solid investment plan and priorities based on group common priorities as well as customer and business needs.
* Together with stakeholders from across the bank set priorities for the delivery of the investment plan and take responsibility for the execution of that plan.
* Be accountable for both the development and maintenance of secure, scalable, and adaptable IT solutions and services.
* Continuously improve and optimise the unit’s capabilities to ensure efficient ways of working within the unit to enable development at pace.
* Building your unit to be an efficient and successful organisation.
* Lead financial planning and performance monitoring.
* Lead resource planning and monitor resource utilization.


 What is needed in this role:
   

  

* You have strong leadership skills and a track record of running a larger unit.
* You are structured and collaborative, with the ability to balance strategic planning and thinking with hands-on execution of plans and decision-making.
* You have experience of running an IT development organisation and is knowledgeable around agile ways of working and IT development processes.
* Solid experience from handling senior stakeholder expectations, building trust, and creating a positive solution-oriented work environment.
* Solid experience from driving transformation affecting many areas and the ability to set a direction and deliver on defined targets.
* Good understanding of customer behaviour and customer experience in a banking perspective.
* Result oriented – you create commitment and trust at all levels, both inside and outside your own organisation, to achieve results.
* Excellent communication skills and great stakeholder management skills overall.
* Fluent in Swedish and English, both written and spoken.
* Academic degree within finance, engineering, management or another relevant field.
* This is a senior role with strong impact on customer experience, business outcomes, and cross-organizational collaboration.


 With us, you can experience:
   

  

* Personal and professional growth through self-leadership and continuous development.
* Meaningful work that positively impacts our workplace, our customers, and society.
* An open and collaborative culture that encourages cross-functional teamwork and provides networking opportunities.
* A supportive and inclusive environment that promotes a balanced and sustainable work-life, with flexible working conditions when suitable for the role.
* Benefits such as our share based reward program Eken, company pension plan, employee offer for banking products, health insurance.


 "Join our team and...
   

  

 be part of a value driven delivery organisation working closely with our Product unit within Group Payment & Accounts as well as stakeholders across Swedbank.”
 **Robert Pehrson, your future manager.**
 We look forward to receiving your application by 30.06.2026.
   

  

**Location:** 
**Stockholm, Sundbyberg**
**Recruiting manager: Robert Pehrson**
 We want to inform you that the selection process may begin after the summer holidays.
   

  

 We would like to let you know that a background check and a drug test may be a part of the process for this role.
   

  

*We have made our choice regarding recruitment media and therefore kindly decline contact with ad sellers or sellers of other recruitment services.*
**Swedbank does not discriminate anybody based on gender, age, sexual orientation or sexual identity, ethnicity, religion or disability – everybody is welcome.**
